metadata.name: pynginxconfig-new
metadata.description: NginX configuration files parser and generator - unstable new version

summary.zh: pynginxconfig-new 是一个用于解析和生成 Nginx 配置文件的 Python 工具，作为不稳定新版本，专注于提供更高效的配置处理能力。它适用于自动化运维和服务器管理场景，通过重构解析器提升代码可维护性，支持测试验证功能。
summary.en: pynginxconfig-new is a Python tool for parsing and generating Nginx configuration files, serving as an unstable new version focused on enhanced configuration processing efficiency. It is suitable for automated operations and server management, featuring a refactored parser for improved code maintainability and test validation support.

metadata.name: clash-verge-rev
metadata.description: A modern GUI client based on Tauri, designed to run in Windows, macOS and Linux for tailored proxy experience

summary.zh: Clash Verge Rev 是一款基于 Tauri 2 框架开发的跨平台代理客户端，支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux。它内置 Clash.Meta 内核，提供配置文件管理、TUN 模式、可视化节点编辑等功能，旨在为用户提供简洁美观的图形界面和定制化的代理体验。
summary.en: Clash Verge Rev is a cross-platform proxy client built on the Tauri 2 framework, supporting Windows, macOS, and Linux. It integrates the Clash.Meta kernel and offers features like configuration management, TUN mode, and visual node editing, delivering a sleek GUI and tailored proxy experience.

metadata.name: PicGo
metadata.description: :rocket: The Ultimate Image Uploader for Efficient Creators. Supports Obsidian, Typora, VS Code etc. and 60+ image hosting services  (S3, GitHub, Cloudflare R2, Imgur, Aliyun OSS...). Paste, upload, done.

summary.zh: PicGo是一款专为高效创作者设计的终极图片上传工具，支持Obsidian、Typora、VS Code等编辑器，并兼容60多种图片托管服务（如S3、GitHub、Cloudflare R2、Imgur、阿里云OSS）。它通过拖放、粘贴、快捷键等方式快速上传图片，自动复制链接，实现无缝创作流程，提升工作效率。
summary.en: PicGo is the ultimate image uploader for efficient creators, supporting editors like Obsidian, Typora, and VS Code, and compatible with over 60 image hosting services (e.g., S3, GitHub, Cloudflare R2, Imgur, Aliyun OSS). It enables fast uploads via drag-and-drop, paste, or hotkeys, automatically copying links to streamline creative workflows and boost productivity.

metadata.name: wsl2-distro-manager
metadata.description: A GUI to quickly manage your WSL2 instances

summary.zh: WSL Manager 是一款免费开源的图形界面工具，专为管理 Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) 实例设计。它提供一键安装、卸载、更新、备份和恢复 WSL 发行版的功能，支持 Docker 镜像和 LXC 容器作为实例，并包含快速操作脚本和跨机器共享等增强特性，适用于开发者和系统管理员简化 WSL 环境管理。
summary.en: WSL Manager is a free and open-source GUI tool designed for managing Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) instances. It enables one-click installation, uninstallation, updating, backup, and restoration of WSL distros, supports Docker images and LXC containers as instances, and includes features like quick action scripts and cross-machine sharing, ideal for developers and sysadmins to streamline WSL environment management.

metadata.name: kula
metadata.description: Lightweight, self-contained Linux® server monitoring tool

summary.zh: Kula 是一款轻量级、自包含的 Linux 服务器监控工具，通过直接读取 /proc 和 /sys 系统文件每秒收集 CPU、内存、网络、磁盘等关键指标，并利用内置的分层环形缓冲区存储引擎持久化数据。它提供实时 Web UI 仪表盘和终端 TUI 界面，无需外部数据库或依赖，单二进制文件部署，适用于快速服务器监控和运维场景。
summary.en: Kula is a lightweight, self-contained Linux server monitoring tool that collects key metrics such as CPU, memory, network, and disk by reading directly from /proc and /sys files every second. It uses a built-in tiered ring-buffer storage engine for data persistence and offers real-time Web UI dashboards and terminal TUI interfaces. With zero dependencies and a single binary deployment, it is ideal for quick server monitoring and operational tasks.

metadata.name: cloud-mail
metadata.description: A Cloudflare-based email service  | 基于 Cloudflare 的邮箱服务  | Cloudflare Email 邮箱 Mail

summary.zh: Cloud Mail 是一个基于 Cloudflare Workers 构建的简约响应式邮箱服务，支持邮件发送、附件收发和邮件推送。它利用 Cloudflare 生态系统（如 D1、R2、KV）实现低成本部署，提供管理员功能、开放 API 和数据可视化，适用于个人或小型团队搭建私有邮箱服务。
summary.en: Cloud Mail is a minimalist, responsive email service built on Cloudflare Workers, supporting email sending, attachment handling, and mail forwarding. It leverages the Cloudflare ecosystem (e.g., D1, R2, KV) for low-cost deployment, offering admin features, open APIs, and data visualization, ideal for individuals or small teams to set up private email services.

metadata.name: ghostty
metadata.description: 👻 Ghostty is a fast, feature-rich, and cross-platform terminal emulator that uses platform-native UI and GPU acceleration.

summary.zh: Ghostty 是一款快速、功能丰富且跨平台的终端模拟器，采用平台原生 UI 和 GPU 加速技术，旨在提供高性能、标准兼容的终端体验，支持多窗口、标签页等现代功能，适用于开发者和日常命令行操作。
summary.en: Ghostty is a fast, feature-rich, and cross-platform terminal emulator that leverages platform-native UI and GPU acceleration to deliver high-performance, standards-compliant terminal experiences, supporting modern features like multi-window and tabbing for developers and daily command-line use.

metadata.name: Thaw
metadata.description: Menu bar manager for macOS 26

summary.zh: Thaw 是一款专为 macOS 设计的菜单栏管理工具，核心功能是隐藏和显示菜单栏项目，旨在提供多样化特性以提升用户体验。作为 Ice 项目的活跃分支，它持续修复漏洞、确保与最新 macOS 版本的兼容性，并计划实现更多功能，支持多语言界面和通过 Homebrew 便捷安装。
summary.en: Thaw is a menu bar management tool for macOS, primarily focused on hiding and showing menu bar items, with the goal of offering versatile features for enhanced user experience. As an active fork of the Ice project, it continuously fixes bugs, ensures compatibility with the latest macOS releases, and plans to implement additional functionalities, supporting multilingual interfaces and easy installation via Homebrew.

metadata.name: golang-tips-100
metadata.description: You know , for golang tips!

summary.zh: 《Go小技巧&易错点100例》是一个专注于Go语言开发的实用指南，通过100个短小精炼的案例，总结常见小技巧和易错点，涵盖基础知识、框架整合、项目实践和优化实践，帮助开发者高效解决问题和提升编码技能。
summary.en: 《Go Tips & Pitfalls 100 Examples》 is a practical guide for Go developers, featuring 100 concise cases that summarize common tips and pitfalls. It covers basics, framework integration, project practices, and optimization, aiding in efficient problem-solving and skill enhancement.

metadata.name: GithubStarsIndex
metadata.description: 自动抓取 GitHub Stars，生成 AI 摘要，便于检索。

summary.zh: GitHub Stars Index 是一个自动化工具，用于抓取用户 GitHub Stars 中的仓库，通过 AI 生成内容摘要和技术标签，支持标签智能治理、并发处理、增量更新，并自动生成 Markdown 和 HTML 页面，可同步到 Obsidian 或部署为 GitHub Pages，便于检索和管理技术收藏。
summary.en: GitHub Stars Index is an automated tool that fetches repositories from a user's GitHub Stars, generates AI-powered summaries and technical tags, supports intelligent tag governance, concurrent processing, incremental updates, and automatically produces Markdown and HTML pages for easy retrieval and management, with optional sync to Obsidian or deployment as GitHub Pages.

metadata.name: MacCalendar
metadata.description: 完全免费&开源的离线小而美 macOS 菜单栏日历app，支持中国农历、节假日、放假安排、系统日程等

summary.zh: MacCalendar 是一款完全免费、开源的 macOS 菜单栏日历应用，支持离线运行，界面简洁轻量。核心功能包括中国农历、24节气、法定节假日安排，以及系统日历集成与个性化显示设置，适用于需要便捷查看和管理日程的 macOS 用户。
summary.en: MacCalendar is a completely free, open-source macOS menu bar calendar app that runs offline with a clean, lightweight interface. Key features include Chinese lunar calendar, 24 solar terms, statutory holiday schedules, and integration with system calendars, ideal for macOS users seeking efficient schedule management.

summary.zh: 《OpenResty最佳实践》是一本开源书籍，专注于分享OpenResty在服务端开发中的实战经验和最佳实践。它旨在帮助开发者快速掌握高性能Web开发技巧，提升代码质量，减少加班，适用于API网关、微服务等场景。
summary.en: 《OpenResty Best Practices》 is an open-source book that shares practical experiences and best practices for using OpenResty in server-side development. It aims to help developers quickly master high-performance web development techniques, improve code quality, and reduce overtime, suitable for scenarios like API gateways and microservices.

metadata.name: oneterm
metadata.description: Provide secure access and control over all infrastructure

summary.zh: OneTerm 是一款基于 4A 理念（认证、授权、账户、审计）的企业级堡垒机，提供安全访问和控制基础设施的核心功能。它通过访问控制、安全审计、会话录制和统一入口，确保系统安全与合规，适用于运维管理和安全监控场景。技术栈采用 Go 语言和 Ant Design Pro Vue 前端框架，实现轻量级、灵活部署。
summary.en: OneTerm is an enterprise-level bastion host based on the 4A concept (Authentication, Authorization, Account, Audit), offering secure access and control over infrastructure. It ensures system security and compliance through features like access control, security auditing, session recording, and unified entry points, suitable for operations management and security monitoring. Built with Go and Ant Design Pro Vue, it is lightweight and flexible for deployment.

metadata.name: termora
metadata.description: Termora is a terminal emulator and SSH client for Windows, macOS and Linux.

summary.zh: Termora 是一款跨平台终端模拟器和 SSH 客户端，支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux。它基于 Kotlin/JVM 开发，部分实现 XTerm 控制序列协议，内置密钥管理、X11 转发、SSH-Agent 集成等功能，并提供 GUI 文件管理、多并发传输和插件扩展。长期目标是通过 Kotlin Multiplatform 实现全平台支持。
summary.en: Termora is a cross-platform terminal emulator and SSH client for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Built with Kotlin/JVM and partially implementing the XTerm control sequence protocol, it features built-in key management, X11 forwarding, SSH-Agent integration, GUI file management, concurrent transfers, and plugin extensibility. Its long-term goal is full platform support via Kotlin Multiplatform.

metadata.name: excalidraw-mcp
metadata.description: excalidraw mcp

summary.zh: Excalidraw MCP Server 是一个基于 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 的服务器，使 AI 智能体（如 Claude、Cursor、Windsurf）能够在对话中直接创建、编辑和管理 Excalidraw 图表。它通过 WebSocket 实现实时预览，支持 Mermaid 语法转换、多会话切换和多种导出格式，适用于 AI 驱动的可视化思维和编程式图表生成。
summary.en: Excalidraw MCP Server is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables AI agents (e.g., Claude, Cursor, Windsurf) to create, edit, and manage Excalidraw diagrams directly within conversations. It features real-time preview via WebSocket, supports Mermaid syntax conversion, multi-session switching, and various export formats, ideal for AI-powered visual thinking and programmable diagramming.

metadata.name: kubedog
metadata.description: Library to watch and follow kubernetes resources in CI/CD deploy pipelines

summary.zh: Kubedog 是一个用于在 CI/CD 部署流水线中监控和跟踪 Kubernetes 资源的库，集成于 werf 工具，提供资源状态实时追踪功能，简化部署过程管理。
summary.en: Kubedog is a library for watching and following Kubernetes resources in CI/CD deploy pipelines, integrated with the werf tool to provide real-time resource state tracking and simplify deployment management.

metadata.name: go-bindata
metadata.description: Turn data file into go code.

summary.zh: go-bindata 是一个 Go 语言工具，用于将任意文件转换为可管理的 Go 源代码，实现二进制数据嵌入到 Go 程序中。它支持 gzip 压缩和调试模式，适用于静态资源嵌入、Web 服务器开发等场景，提升部署效率和开发便利性。
summary.en: go-bindata is a Go tool that converts any file into manageable Go source code for embedding binary data into Go programs. It features gzip compression and debug mode, making it suitable for scenarios like static resource embedding and web server development, enhancing deployment efficiency and development convenience.

metadata.name: zsh-autosuggestions
metadata.description: Fish-like autosuggestions for zsh

summary.zh: zsh-autosuggestions 是一个为 Zsh 提供类 Fish 自动建议功能的插件，基于历史记录和补全机制实时推荐命令，提升命令行输入效率。它支持高度可配置的策略和样式，适用于需要快速交互的终端用户。
summary.en: zsh-autosuggestions is a plugin for Zsh that provides Fish-like autosuggestions, offering real-time command recommendations based on history and completions to enhance command-line input efficiency. It features configurable strategies and styles, ideal for terminal users seeking fast interaction.

metadata.name: btop
metadata.description: A monitor of resources

summary.zh: btop++ 是一款基于 C++23 开发的跨平台系统资源监控工具，提供实时、美观的终端界面，支持 Linux、macOS、FreeBSD、NetBSD 和 OpenBSD。其核心价值在于高性能、高度可配置的监控体验，包括 CPU、内存、网络、进程和 GPU 资源可视化，适用于系统管理员和开发者进行运维监控与性能调优。
summary.en: btop++ is a cross-platform system resource monitor built with C++23, offering a real-time, visually appealing terminal interface for Linux, macOS, FreeBSD, NetBSD, and OpenBSD. It excels in high performance and extensive configurability, featuring monitoring of CPU, memory, network, processes, and GPU resources, making it ideal for system administrators and developers in operations and performance tuning.

metadata.name: sqlc
metadata.description: Generate type-safe code from SQL

summary.zh: sqlc 是一个 SQL 编译器，通过解析 SQL 查询自动生成类型安全的代码，支持 Go、Kotlin、Python 和 TypeScript 等多种语言。它简化了数据库交互，减少手动编写 ORM 或查询代码的错误，提升开发效率和代码质量，适用于需要强类型数据库访问的现代应用开发。
summary.en: sqlc is a SQL compiler that automatically generates type-safe code from SQL queries, supporting languages like Go, Kotlin, Python, and TypeScript. It streamlines database interactions by reducing manual errors in ORM or query code, enhancing development efficiency and code quality for modern applications requiring strong typing.

metadata.name: Easydict
metadata.description: 一个简洁优雅的词典翻译 macOS App。开箱即用，支持离线 OCR 识别，支持有道词典，🍎 苹果系统词典，🍎 苹果系统翻译，OpenAI，Gemini，DeepL，Google，Bing，腾讯，百度，阿里，小牛，彩云和火山翻译。A concise and elegant Dictionary and Translator macOS App for looking up words and translating text.

summary.zh: Easydict 是一款简洁优雅的 macOS 词典翻译应用，开箱即用，支持离线 OCR 识别和多种翻译服务，包括苹果系统词典、OpenAI、DeepL 等，提供输入、选择和截图翻译功能，自动识别语言，提升跨语言查询效率。
summary.en: Easydict is a concise and elegant macOS dictionary and translation app, ready to use out of the box with offline OCR support and multiple translation services like Apple System Dictionary, OpenAI, and DeepL, offering input, selection, and screenshot translation with automatic language detection for efficient cross-language lookups.

metadata.name: LLPlayer
metadata.description: The media player for language learning, with dual subtitles, AI-generated subtitles, real-time translation, and more!

summary.zh: LLPlayer 是一款专为语言学习设计的媒体播放器，支持双字幕显示、AI 生成字幕、实时翻译和 OCR 字幕转换。它集成了 Whisper、Tesseract 等 AI 技术，提供上下文感知翻译和在线视频播放功能，适用于外语学习者和内容创作者，提升学习效率和体验。
summary.en: LLPlayer is a media player designed for language learning, featuring dual subtitles, AI-generated subtitles, real-time translation, and OCR conversion. It integrates AI technologies like Whisper and Tesseract, offering context-aware translation and online video playback, ideal for language learners and content creators to enhance learning efficiency.

metadata.name: dockerman.app
metadata.description: A modern, lightweight Docker management UI built with Tauri and React. Focus on simplicity and performance for Docker container management.

summary.zh: Dockerman 是一款基于 Tauri 和 React 构建的现代化轻量级 Docker 管理界面，专注于简化 Docker 容器管理。核心价值在于提供快速启动、低资源消耗的本地操作体验，支持实时监控、容器管理、文件浏览和国际化等功能，适用于开发者和运维人员高效管理 Docker 环境。
summary.en: Dockerman is a modern, lightweight Docker management UI built with Tauri and React, focusing on simplicity and performance for Docker container management. It offers fast startup, minimal resource usage, local-only operation, real-time monitoring, container management, file browsing, and internationalization support, ideal for developers and operators to efficiently handle Docker environments.

metadata.name: Mate-Engine
metadata.description: A free Desktop Mate alternative with a lightweight interface and custom VRM support, though with more features.

summary.zh: Mate Engine 是一款免费、轻量级的桌面伴侣软件，作为 Desktop Mate 的开源替代品，支持自定义 VRM 模型和丰富的模组功能。它提供窗口/任务栏坐姿、音乐舞蹈、头部/脊柱/眼部追踪等交互特性，并通过 Steam 版本提供独家内容和自动更新，适用于虚拟桌面助手和个性化娱乐场景。
summary.en: Mate Engine is a free, lightweight desktop companion software serving as an open-source alternative to Desktop Mate, with support for custom VRM models and extensive modding capabilities. It features interactive elements like window/taskbar sitting, music-based dancing, and head/spine/eye tracking, while the Steam version offers exclusive content and automatic updates, ideal for virtual desktop assistants and personalized entertainment.

metadata.name: lima
metadata.description: Linux virtual machines, with a focus on running containers

summary.zh: Lima 是一个专注于运行容器的 Linux 虚拟机管理工具，支持自动文件共享和端口转发，类似 WSL2。它最初旨在为 Mac 用户推广 containerd 和 nerdctl，但也支持 Docker、Podman、Kubernetes 等其他容器引擎，并可运行非容器应用。Lima 还兼容 Linux、NetBSD 等非 macOS 主机，简化了跨平台容器开发和测试环境搭建。
summary.en: Lima is a Linux virtual machine manager focused on running containers, featuring automatic file sharing and port forwarding, similar to WSL2. It was originally designed to promote containerd and nerdctl to Mac users, but also supports other container engines like Docker, Podman, and Kubernetes, and can run non-container applications. Lima is compatible with non-macOS hosts such as Linux and NetBSD, simplifying cross-platform container development and testing environment setup.

metadata.name: deskflow
metadata.description: Share a single keyboard and mouse between multiple computers.

summary.zh: Deskflow是一款免费开源的键盘鼠标共享应用，允许用户使用一台计算机的键盘、鼠标或触控板无缝控制附近的多台计算机，实现跨设备高效工作。它类似于软件KVM（但不包括视频传输），默认启用TLS加密，支持Wayland和剪贴板共享，适用于多设备协同办公场景。
summary.en: Deskflow is a free and open-source keyboard and mouse sharing application that enables users to seamlessly control multiple nearby computers using the keyboard, mouse, or trackpad of one computer, facilitating efficient cross-device workflows. It functions like a software KVM (without video), with TLS encryption enabled by default, support for Wayland, and clipboard sharing, ideal for multi-device collaboration.

metadata.name: sun-panel
metadata.description: A server, NAS navigation panel, Homepage, browser homepage. | 一个服务器、NAS导航面板、Homepage、浏览器首页。

summary.zh: Sun-Panel 是一个开源的服务器和 NAS 导航面板，可作为浏览器首页或主页，提供简洁界面、低资源消耗和可视化操作。支持 Docker 部署、多账户隔离、系统状态监控及自定义 JS/CSS，适用于个人或企业用户快速搭建个性化导航界面。
summary.en: Sun-Panel is an open-source server and NAS navigation panel, serving as a browser homepage or dashboard with a clean interface, low resource usage, and visual operations. It supports Docker deployment, multi-account isolation, system status monitoring, and custom JS/CSS, ideal for personal or enterprise users to quickly set up personalized navigation interfaces.

metadata.name: server
metadata.description: ☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

summary.zh: Nextcloud Server 是一个开源的自托管云平台，提供文件存储、同步、分享和协作功能，支持日历、联系人、邮件等扩展应用，强调数据安全和隐私保护，适用于个人、企业和组织构建私有云服务。
summary.en: Nextcloud Server is an open-source self-hosted cloud platform offering file storage, synchronization, sharing, and collaboration features, with extensibility through apps like calendar and contacts, focusing on data security and privacy for personal, enterprise, and organizational private cloud solutions.

metadata.name: yacd
metadata.description: Yet Another Clash Dashboard

summary.zh: yacd 是一个基于 Web 的 Clash 代理客户端仪表盘，提供简洁直观的界面来管理和监控 Clash 配置、连接和流量。它支持通过 Docker 快速部署，并允许通过 URL 参数自定义后端 API 连接和主题，适用于网络代理管理和运维场景。
summary.en: yacd is a web-based dashboard for the Clash proxy client, offering a clean and intuitive interface to manage and monitor Clash configurations, connections, and traffic. It supports quick deployment via Docker and allows customization of backend API connections and themes through URL parameters, suitable for network proxy management and operations.

summary.zh: 该项目将经典游戏《地下城与勇士》封装为Docker镜像，基于官方CentOS系统，通过环境变量和初始化脚本实现快速部署。支持多区服配置、假人功能和插件扩展，适用于个人或小规模私服搭建，提供进程管理和数据库集成，简化运维流程。
summary.en: This project packages the classic game Dungeon & Fighter into a Docker image, based on official CentOS systems, enabling rapid deployment via environment variables and initialization scripts. It supports multi-server configurations, bot functionality, and plugin extensions, suitable for personal or small-scale private server setups, with process management and database integration to simplify operations.

metadata.name: intro-linux-sys-prog
metadata.description: A repository of all code from Introduction to System Programming in Linux, by Stewart Weiss

summary.zh: 该仓库是《Linux系统编程入门》一书的配套代码库，提供实践示例，涵盖文件操作、进程管理、信号处理等核心系统编程主题。代码按章节组织，便于学习和实验，适用于Linux环境下的系统编程教学与开发。
summary.en: This repository contains companion code for the book 'Introduction to System Programming in Linux', offering hands-on examples on file operations, process management, signal handling, and other key system programming topics. Organized by chapters, it facilitates learning and experimentation for system programming education and development in Linux environments.

metadata.name: NoteDiscovery
metadata.description: Your Self-Hosted Knowledge Base

summary.zh: NoteDiscovery 是一款轻量级、自托管的笔记应用，提供美观的现代界面，支持 Markdown 编辑、本地文件存储和交互式图谱视图。核心价值在于完全控制数据隐私、零成本部署和快速搜索功能，适用于个人知识库、团队协作和隐私敏感用户。
summary.en: NoteDiscovery is a lightweight, self-hosted note-taking application with a modern interface, supporting Markdown editing, local file storage, and interactive graph views. It offers complete data privacy control, zero-cost deployment, and fast search capabilities, ideal for personal knowledge bases, team collaboration, and privacy-conscious users.

metadata.name: awesome-go
metadata.description: A curated list of awesome Go frameworks, libraries and software

summary.zh: avelino/awesome-go 是一个精心整理的 Go 语言资源列表，收录了框架、库和软件，为开发者提供一站式参考。它覆盖了从人工智能到区块链的广泛领域，通过社区维护和自动化测试确保内容质量，适用于学习和项目开发。
summary.en: avelino/awesome-go is a curated list of Go frameworks, libraries, and software, serving as a one-stop reference for developers. It spans diverse areas from AI to blockchain, maintained by the community with automated testing to ensure quality, ideal for learning and project development.

metadata.name: fastscheduler
metadata.description: Decorator-first Python scheduler — cron/interval/at jobs with simple persistence and built-in run history.

summary.zh: FastScheduler 是一个基于装饰器的 Python 任务调度库，支持异步、时区处理、cron 表达式和实时监控仪表板。它提供简单 API 实现定时、间隔和一次性任务，内置持久化、自动重试和失败队列，适用于自动化运维和后台作业管理。
summary.en: FastScheduler is a decorator-first Python task scheduler with async support, timezone handling, cron expressions, and a real-time dashboard. It offers a simple API for scheduling interval, cron, and one-time jobs, featuring persistence, automatic retries, and a dead letter queue, ideal for automation and background task management.

metadata.name: marten
metadata.description: Elegant, minimalist Go web framework – nothing in the way.

summary.zh: Marten 是一个优雅、极简的 Go Web 框架，完全基于 Go 标准库构建，零外部依赖。它提供快速路由、链式中间件、高效上下文池和内置响应助手，适用于构建高性能、可预测的 Web 应用和服务。
summary.en: Marten is an elegant, minimalist Go web framework built entirely on Go's standard library with zero external dependencies. It features fast routing, chainable middleware, efficient context pooling, and built-in response helpers, ideal for building high-performance, predictable web applications and services.

metadata.name: Mole
metadata.description: 🐹 Deep clean and optimize your Mac.

summary.zh: Mole 是一款专为 macOS 设计的系统优化工具，通过单一二进制文件提供深度清理、智能卸载、磁盘分析和实时监控功能，帮助用户高效释放存储空间并提升系统性能。其安全设计确保操作可控，支持预览模式以避免误删。
summary.en: Mole is a system optimization tool designed for macOS, offering deep cleaning, smart uninstallation, disk analysis, and real-time monitoring through a single binary. It efficiently frees up storage space and enhances system performance, with safety-first defaults and dry-run previews to prevent accidental deletions.

metadata.name: icloud_photos_downloader
metadata.description: A command-line tool to download photos from iCloud

summary.zh: iCloud Photos Downloader 是一个命令行工具，用于从 iCloud 下载照片，支持跨平台（Linux、Windows、macOS）和多种部署方式（如 Docker、PyPI）。它提供复制、同步和移动三种操作模式，支持 Live Photos 和 RAW 图像，具备自动去重和增量下载优化功能，适用于个人数据备份和自动化照片管理场景。
summary.en: iCloud Photos Downloader is a command-line tool for downloading photos from iCloud, supporting cross-platform (Linux, Windows, macOS) and multiple deployment methods (e.g., Docker, PyPI). It offers copy, sync, and move modes, supports Live Photos and RAW images, and includes features like automatic deduplication and incremental download optimization, ideal for personal data backup and automated photo management.

metadata.name: TaskExplorer
metadata.description: Power full Task Manager

summary.zh: TaskExplorer 是一款功能强大的任务管理器，专为深度监控 Windows 系统进程而设计。它通过实时面板展示线程堆栈、内存编辑、句柄详情、网络连接等关键信息，支持多进程并行检查与系统资源图形化监控，适用于系统调试、性能优化和安全分析。基于 Qt 框架开发，具备跨平台潜力。
summary.en: TaskExplorer is a powerful task manager designed for deep monitoring of Windows system processes. It displays real-time panels for thread stacks, memory editing, handle details, network connections, and more, supporting multi-process inspection and graphical system resource monitoring. Ideal for system debugging, performance optimization, and security analysis. Built with Qt framework, offering cross-platform potential.

metadata.name: CrystalDiskInfo
metadata.description: CrystalDiskInfo

summary.zh: CrystalDiskInfo 是一款专业的磁盘健康监测工具，支持 PATA、SATA、NVMe 等多种硬盘接口，并兼容 USB 驱动器和 RAID 控制器。它通过读取 SMART 数据提供详细的磁盘状态信息，适用于系统监控和硬件故障预警。
summary.en: CrystalDiskInfo is a professional disk health monitoring tool that supports various interfaces including PATA, SATA, and NVMe, with compatibility for USB drives and RAID controllers. It provides detailed disk status information by reading SMART data, suitable for system monitoring and hardware failure alerts.

metadata.name: Ventoy
metadata.description: A new bootable USB solution.

summary.zh: Ventoy是一款开源工具，用于创建可启动USB驱动器，支持ISO/WIM/IMG/VHD(x)/EFI文件。用户无需重复格式化磁盘，只需复制镜像文件即可启动，并支持多镜像选择和本地文件浏览。兼容多种架构和分区样式，广泛支持Windows、Linux等操作系统，已测试超过1300个ISO文件。
summary.en: Ventoy is an open-source tool for creating bootable USB drives that support ISO/WIM/IMG/VHD(x)/EFI files. It eliminates the need for repeated disk formatting by allowing users to copy image files directly and boot them, with support for multiple images and local file browsing. Compatible with various architectures and partition styles, it extensively supports operating systems like Windows and Linux, with over 1300 ISO files tested.

metadata.name: build-your-own-x
metadata.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供从零开始重建各类技术的详细教程，涵盖3D渲染器、AI模型、区块链、操作系统等30多个领域，通过实践编程帮助开发者深入理解技术原理，提升编程能力。
summary.en: This repository offers step-by-step tutorials for recreating various technologies from scratch, covering over 30 areas such as 3D renderers, AI models, blockchain, and operating systems, helping developers gain deep technical insights and improve programming skills through hands-on practice.

metadata.name: zap
metadata.description: Blazing fast, structured, leveled logging in Go.

summary.zh: Zap 是一个专为 Go 语言设计的高性能结构化日志库，提供极速的日志记录能力，支持分级日志和结构化输出。它通过无反射、零分配的 JSON 编码器优化性能，适用于对性能要求苛刻的应用场景，如微服务、高并发系统。
summary.en: Zap is a high-performance structured logging library for Go, offering blazing-fast logging with leveled and structured output. It optimizes performance through a reflection-free, zero-allocation JSON encoder, ideal for performance-critical applications like microservices and high-concurrency systems.

metadata.name: how-to-write-makefile
metadata.description: 跟我一起写Makefile重制版

summary.zh: 该项目是《跟我一起写Makefile》系列文章的重制版，基于陈皓的经典教程和GNU Make Manual，使用Sphinx工具重新排版生成精美PDF和HTML文档。核心价值在于提供高质量、语法高亮的Makefile学习资源，适用于开发者学习构建自动化工具。技术亮点包括Sphinx文档生成和自动化编译流程。
summary.en: This project is a remake of the 'How to Write Makefile' series, based on Chen Hao's classic tutorial and GNU Make Manual, using Sphinx to generate beautifully formatted PDF and HTML documents. It offers high-quality, syntax-highlighted learning resources for Makefile, targeting developers in build automation. Key features include Sphinx documentation generation and automated compilation workflows.

metadata.name: LiteMonitor
metadata.description: 一款轻量级、高度可定制的 Windows桌面和任务栏硬件性能监控工具，支持监测 CPU、GPU、内存、磁盘、网速、FPS 计数、插件扩展及内存清理。A lightweight, customizable hardware monitor for the Windows desktop & taskbar. Features CPU/GPU/RAM/Network monitoring, FPS counter, plugin support, and memory optimization.

summary.zh: LiteMonitor是一款专为Windows设计的轻量级开源桌面硬件监控工具，支持实时监测CPU、GPU、内存、磁盘、网络等系统性能，并提供FPS计数、内存清理和插件扩展功能。其高度可定制化界面支持横竖屏、任务栏和网页显示，具备主题切换、多语言、三色报警等特性，适用于个人电脑性能优化和系统运维场景。
summary.en: LiteMonitor is a lightweight, open-source desktop hardware monitoring tool for Windows, offering real-time tracking of CPU, GPU, memory, disk, network, and other system metrics, along with FPS counting, memory optimization, and plugin support. It features a highly customizable interface with horizontal/vertical, taskbar, and web display modes, theme switching, multi-language support, and three-color alerts, ideal for personal computer performance tuning and system maintenance.

metadata.name: fluentui-system-icons
metadata.description: Fluent System Icons are a collection of familiar, friendly and modern icons from Microsoft.

summary.zh: Fluent UI System Icons 是微软提供的一套熟悉、友好且现代的图标集合，专为跨平台应用设计。它支持 Android、iOS、macOS 和 Flutter 等多种平台，提供 SVG 格式和自动化构建工具，强调图标的方向性和一致性，适用于 UI 设计和前端开发场景。
summary.en: Fluent UI System Icons is a collection of familiar, friendly, and modern icons from Microsoft, designed for cross-platform applications. It supports multiple platforms including Android, iOS, macOS, and Flutter, offering SVG formats and automated build tools, with a focus on icon directionality and consistency for UI design and frontend development.

metadata.name: bunster
metadata.description: Compile shell scripts to static binaries.

summary.zh: Bunster 是一个创新的 Shell 编译器，将 Bash 脚本转换为独立、安全的静态二进制文件，无需依赖外部 Shell。它通过转译为 Go 代码并编译，提供模块化、包管理、原生环境文件支持和静态资源嵌入等高级功能，适用于跨平台部署和自动化工具开发。
summary.en: Bunster is an innovative shell compiler that converts Bash scripts into standalone, secure static binaries without relying on external shells. It transpiles scripts to Go code and compiles them, offering advanced features like modularity, package management, native .env file support, and static asset embedding, ideal for cross-platform deployment and automation tool development.

metadata.name: sshfs
metadata.description: A network filesystem client to connect to SSH servers

summary.zh: SSHFS是一个基于SFTP协议的网络文件系统客户端，允许用户通过SSH连接挂载远程文件系统。它无需服务器端配置，支持直接端口和vsock连接以提升性能，适用于跨平台文件访问和虚拟机环境。该项目成熟稳定，但维护资源有限，主要依赖社区贡献。
summary.en: SSHFS is a network filesystem client that mounts remote filesystems using SFTP over SSH. It requires no server-side configuration and supports direct port and vsock connections for performance optimization, ideal for cross-platform file access and virtual machine environments. The project is mature and stable, but maintenance is limited, relying on community contributions.

metadata.name: fastfetch
metadata.description: A maintained, feature-rich and performance oriented, neofetch like system information tool.

summary.zh: Fastfetch 是一款类似 neofetch 的系统信息获取工具，专注于高性能和可定制性，支持 Linux、macOS、Windows 等多平台，以 C 语言编写，提供丰富的配置选项和视觉展示。
summary.en: Fastfetch is a neofetch-like tool for fetching and displaying system information with a focus on performance and customizability, written primarily in C and supporting multiple platforms including Linux, macOS, and Windows.

metadata.name: stats
metadata.description: macOS system monitor in your menu bar

summary.zh: Stats 是一款 macOS 系统监控工具，以菜单栏图标形式实时显示 CPU、GPU、内存、磁盘、网络、电池等关键系统资源使用情况。它支持传感器数据、蓝牙设备监控和多时区时钟，提供轻量级、直观的系统性能监控解决方案，适用于开发者和普通用户优化系统性能。
summary.en: Stats is a macOS system monitoring tool that displays real-time key system resource usage such as CPU, GPU, memory, disk, network, and battery in the menu bar. It supports sensor data, Bluetooth device monitoring, and multiple time zone clocks, offering a lightweight and intuitive solution for system performance monitoring, suitable for developers and general users to optimize system performance.

metadata.name: Pearcleaner
metadata.description: A free, source-available and fair-code licensed mac app cleaner

summary.zh: Pearcleaner 是一款免费、开源且采用公平代码许可的 macOS 应用清理工具，专为深度卸载应用、管理残留文件和优化系统资源而设计。它支持拖拽操作、Finder 扩展、自动化监控和多种实用功能，如架构剥离和翻译清理，适用于普通用户和开发者，提升 macOS 设备维护效率。
summary.en: Pearcleaner is a free, source-available, and fair-code licensed macOS app cleaner designed for deep uninstallation, orphaned file management, and system optimization. It features drag-and-drop support, Finder extensions, automated monitoring, and utilities like architecture stripping and translation pruning, catering to both general users and developers for enhanced macOS maintenance.

metadata.name: Keyden
metadata.description: Keyden is a clean and elegant macOS menu bar TOTP authenticator — securely store secrets in macOS Keychain, add accounts via QR code scanning, and copy codes with one click . Keyden 是一款简洁优雅的 macOS 菜单栏 TOTP 验证器——密钥安全存储于 macOS 钥匙串，支持扫码添加账号与一键复制验证码

summary.zh: Keyden 是一款专为 macOS 设计的菜单栏 TOTP 验证器，提供简洁优雅的用户界面。它通过 macOS 钥匙串安全存储密钥，支持扫码添加账号、一键复制验证码，并具备批量导入、GitHub Gist 同步、离线优先和主题支持等功能，适用于个人和企业用户进行双因素身份验证管理。
summary.en: Keyden is a clean and elegant macOS menu bar TOTP authenticator designed for secure two-factor authentication management. It stores secrets in macOS Keychain, supports QR code scanning for account addition, one-click code copying, and features batch import, GitHub Gist sync, offline-first operation, and theme support, ideal for personal and enterprise use.

metadata.name: shell360
metadata.description: Shell360 is a cross-platform SSH and SFTP client.

summary.zh: Shell360 是一款跨平台 SSH 和 SFTP 客户端，支持 Windows、macOS、Linux、Android 和 iOS。它提供安全的远程连接、文件传输和端口转发功能，适用于远程开发、服务器管理和安全文件传输。基于 Tauri 框架，结合 TypeScript、React 和 Rust 技术栈，确保高性能和跨平台一致性。
summary.en: Shell360 is a cross-platform SSH and SFTP client supporting Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, and iOS. It offers secure remote connections, file transfers, and port forwarding, ideal for remote development, server management, and secure file handling. Built with Tauri, TypeScript, React, and Rust, it ensures high performance and consistent cross-platform experience.

metadata.name: duplicati
metadata.description: Store securely encrypted backups in the cloud!

summary.zh: Duplicati 是一款免费开源的备份客户端，支持在云端存储服务上安全存储加密、增量、压缩的备份。它采用 AES-256 加密，支持多种云存储和远程服务器，提供跨平台桌面应用和命令行工具，适用于个人和企业数据保护。
summary.en: Duplicati is a free, open-source backup client that securely stores encrypted, incremental, and compressed backups on cloud storage services. It uses AES-256 encryption, supports multiple cloud providers and remote servers, and offers cross-platform desktop applications and command-line tools for personal and enterprise data protection.

metadata.name: flymd
metadata.description: 高性能Markdown笔记工具！免费AI，智能便签、TODO推送、本地知识库、AI小说引擎。PDF解析、自动语音笔记、录音转文本。毫秒级启动High-performance Markdown note tool! Free AI, smart notes, TODO reminders, local knowledge base, AI novel engine. PDF parsing, auto voice notes, audio-to-text. Millisecond startup.

summary.zh: FlyMD是一款高性能本地Markdown笔记工具，集AI辅助写作、智能待办推送、PDF解析和本地知识库于一体。支持毫秒级启动、跨平台运行，强调数据安全与扩展性，适用于个人知识管理和高效写作场景。
summary.en: FlyMD is a high-performance local Markdown note tool featuring AI-assisted writing, smart TODO reminders, PDF parsing, and a local knowledge base. It offers millisecond startup, cross-platform support, and emphasizes data security and extensibility, ideal for personal knowledge management and efficient writing.

metadata.name: kite
metadata.description: 🪁 A lightweight, modern Kubernetes dashboard that unifies multi-cluster and resource management, enterprise-grade user governance (OAuth, RBAC, and audit logs), and AI agents in one workspace. Not just a tool, but more like a platform.

summary.zh: Kite 是一款轻量级、现代化的 Kubernetes 仪表板，集成了多集群与资源管理、企业级用户治理（OAuth、RBAC、审计日志）和 AI 智能体于一体。它提供实时监控、YAML 编辑、Web 终端等功能，支持 Docker 和 Helm 部署，旨在提升 Kubernetes 运维效率与平台化体验。
summary.en: Kite is a lightweight, modern Kubernetes dashboard that unifies multi-cluster and resource management, enterprise-grade user governance (OAuth, RBAC, audit logs), and AI agents in one workspace. It offers real-time monitoring, YAML editing, web terminal, and supports Docker and Helm deployments, enhancing Kubernetes operational efficiency and platform experience.

metadata.name: trzsz-ssh
metadata.description: trzsz-ssh ( tssh ) is an ssh client designed as a drop-in replacement for the openssh client. It aims to provide complete compatibility with openssh, mirroring all its features, while also offering additional useful features. Such as login prompt, batch login, remember password, automated interaction, trzsz, zmodem(rz/sz), udp mode like mosh, etc.

summary.zh: trzsz-ssh (tssh) 是一款旨在完全替代 OpenSSH 客户端的 SSH 客户端，提供与 OpenSSH 的完全兼容性，同时集成了登录提示、批量登录、密码记忆、自动化交互、trzsz 文件传输、Zmodem 协议、类似 Mosh 的 UDP 模式等增强功能，适用于远程运维、自动化脚本和高延迟网络环境。
summary.en: trzsz-ssh (tssh) is an SSH client designed as a drop-in replacement for OpenSSH, offering full compatibility while adding features like login prompts, batch login, password memory, automated interaction, trzsz file transfer, Zmodem protocol, and UDP mode similar to Mosh, ideal for remote operations, automation, and high-latency networks.

metadata.name: sshpilot
metadata.description: User-friendly, cross-platform SSH connection manager

summary.zh: SSH Pilot 是一款用户友好、跨平台的 SSH 连接管理器，专为 Linux 和 macOS 设计，提供集成终端和文件管理功能。它支持标签式界面、SFTP 文件管理、服务器分组、端口转发和密钥管理，并确保凭证安全存储，是 Termius、Putty 等工具的轻量级替代品。
summary.en: SSH Pilot is a user-friendly, cross-platform SSH connection manager for Linux and macOS, featuring an integrated terminal and file manager. It offers tabbed interface, SFTP file management, server grouping, port forwarding, and key management with secure credential storage, serving as a lightweight alternative to tools like Termius and Putty.

metadata.name: freelens
metadata.description: Free IDE for Kubernetes

summary.zh: Freelens 是一款免费开源的 Kubernetes 集群管理界面，提供跨平台桌面应用，支持 macOS、Windows 和 Linux。它通过直观的用户界面简化 Kubernetes 的复杂性，适用于开发者和运维人员高效管理容器化环境。
summary.en: Freelens is a free and open-source user interface for managing Kubernetes clusters, offering a cross-platform desktop application compatible with macOS, Windows, and Linux. It simplifies Kubernetes complexities with an intuitive interface, ideal for developers and operators to efficiently handle containerized environments.

metadata.name: ArchiveBox
metadata.description: 🗃 Open source self-hosted web archiving. Takes URLs/browser history/bookmarks/Pocket/Pinboard/etc., saves HTML, JS, PDFs, media, and more...

summary.zh: ArchiveBox 是一款开源自托管的网页归档工具，支持从URL、浏览器历史、书签、Pocket/Pinboard等来源抓取并保存HTML、JS、PDF、媒体等多种格式内容。它提供CLI、REST API和Web界面，适用于个人或组织长期保存网页数据，确保数据可读性和控制权，应用于证据保存、社交媒体备份和研究资料归档等场景。
summary.en: ArchiveBox is an open-source self-hosted web archiving tool that captures and saves content from URLs, browser history, bookmarks, Pocket/Pinboard, etc., in formats like HTML, JS, PDF, and media. It offers CLI, REST API, and web interface, enabling individuals and organizations to preserve web data long-term with readability and control, suitable for evidence preservation, social media backup, and research archiving.

metadata.name: docker-static-website
metadata.description: A very small Docker image (~80KB) to run any static website

summary.zh: 这是一个极简的Docker镜像（约80KB），基于BusyBox httpd静态文件服务器，用于高效运行任何静态网站。它支持多架构（linux/amd64、arm64、arm/v7），提供配置灵活性如反向代理、错误页面定制和访问控制，适用于轻量级部署和容器化静态内容托管。
summary.en: This is a minimal Docker image (~80KB) based on BusyBox httpd static file server for efficiently running any static website. It supports multi-architecture (linux/amd64, arm64, arm/v7) and offers configuration flexibility such as reverse proxy, custom error pages, and access control, ideal for lightweight deployments and containerized static content hosting.

metadata.name: podman-desktop
metadata.description: Podman Desktop is the best free and open source tool to work with Containers and Kubernetes for developers. Get an intuitive and user-friendly interface to effortlessly build, manage, and deploy containers and Kubernetes — all from your desktop.

summary.zh: Podman Desktop 是一款免费开源的桌面图形化工具，专为开发者提供容器与 Kubernetes 的便捷管理。它通过直观界面支持容器构建、运行、调试及部署到 Kubernetes，并兼容多种容器引擎，简化本地开发流程。
summary.en: Podman Desktop is a free and open-source graphical desktop tool designed for developers to manage containers and Kubernetes efficiently. It offers an intuitive interface for building, running, debugging containers, and deploying to Kubernetes, with support for multiple container engines to streamline local development.

metadata.name: rustnet
metadata.description: A cross-platform network monitoring terminal UI tool built with Rust.

summary.zh: RustNet 是一款基于 Rust 开发的跨平台网络监控终端 UI 工具，提供实时网络连接监控、深度包检测和进程关联功能。它填补了简单连接工具与复杂包分析器之间的空白，支持多协议状态跟踪、接口统计和高级过滤，适用于运维监控和网络故障排查。
summary.en: RustNet is a cross-platform network monitoring terminal UI tool built with Rust, offering real-time network connection monitoring, deep packet inspection, and process attribution. It bridges the gap between basic connection tools and packet analyzers, supporting multi-protocol state tracking, interface statistics, and advanced filtering, ideal for operational monitoring and network troubleshooting.

metadata.name: bili-sync
metadata.description: 由 Rust & Tokio 驱动的哔哩哔哩同步工具

summary.zh: bili-sync 是一款专为 NAS 用户设计的哔哩哔哩同步工具，由 Rust 和 Tokio 驱动，实现高效异步并发下载。它支持收藏夹、视频列表、稍后再看和 UP 主投稿的自动扫描与下载，自动选择最优音视频流并用 FFmpeg 合并，提供 Web UI 配置和管理，兼容媒体服务器命名规范，便于媒体库导入。
summary.en: bili-sync is a Bilibili synchronization tool designed for NAS users, powered by Rust and Tokio for efficient asynchronous concurrent downloads. It supports automatic scanning and downloading of favorites, video lists, watch-later, and UP主 uploads, automatically selects optimal audio-video streams and merges them with FFmpeg, offers Web UI for configuration and management, and follows media server naming conventions for easy library import.

metadata.name: theByteBook
metadata.description: ⭐ 【出版书籍】京东购买链接 https://item.jd.com/14531549.html  深入讲解内核网络、Kubernetes、ServiceMesh、容器等云原生相关技术。经历实践检验的 DevOps、SRE指南。

summary.zh: 《深入高可用系统原理与设计》是一本已出版的云原生技术书籍，深入讲解内核网络、Kubernetes、ServiceMesh、容器等核心主题，结合DevOps和SRE实践，提供高可用系统架构的体系化指南。
summary.en: TheByteBook is a published book titled 'In-depth Principles and Design of Highly Available Systems', focusing on cloud-native technologies such as kernel networking, Kubernetes, ServiceMesh, and containers, with practical DevOps and SRE guidance for building resilient architectures.

metadata.name: ssh-hypervisor
metadata.description: 🏠 SSH, but each user gets their own microVM

summary.zh: ssh-hypervisor 是一个基于 Go 语言开发的 SSH 服务器，通过 Firecracker 动态创建 Linux 微虚拟机。它允许用户通过 SSH 连接即时分配独立的微VM，支持快照恢复，适用于轻量级虚拟化、沙箱测试和开发环境快速部署。
summary.en: ssh-hypervisor is an SSH server written in Go that dynamically provisions Linux microVMs using Firecracker. It enables users to instantly allocate isolated microVMs via SSH connections, with snapshot support, ideal for lightweight virtualization, sandbox testing, and rapid development environment setup.

metadata.name: UniGetUI
metadata.description: UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

summary.zh: UniGetUI 是一款为 Windows 10/11 设计的图形化包管理器界面，统一集成 Winget、Scoop、Chocolatey 等主流 CLI 包管理器，提供直观的软件发现、安装、更新和卸载功能，简化多源软件管理流程。
summary.en: UniGetUI is a graphical interface for Windows 10/11 that integrates popular CLI package managers like Winget, Scoop, and Chocolatey, offering an intuitive way to discover, install, update, and uninstall software from multiple sources in one unified tool.

metadata.name: awesome-mac
metadata.description:  This project is dedicated to collecting high-quality macOS software and organizing them systematically by different categories for easy search and use.

summary.zh: Awesome Mac 是一个精心整理的 macOS 优质软件资源库，涵盖开发工具、生产力应用、设计软件等多个类别，旨在帮助用户快速发现和选择适合的 macOS 应用。项目规模庞大，持续更新，支持多语言，并包含开源、免费和 App Store 链接的详细标注，是 macOS 用户和开发者的实用参考指南。
summary.en: Awesome Mac is a curated collection of premium macOS software across categories like development tools, productivity apps, and design software, designed to help users quickly discover and select suitable applications. The project is large-scale, continuously updated, supports multiple languages, and includes detailed annotations for open-source, free, and App Store links, serving as a practical reference for macOS users and developers.

metadata.name: hiddify-app
metadata.description: Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

summary.zh: Hiddify App 是一款基于 Sing-box 的多平台代理客户端，支持 Vless、Vmess、Reality、TUIC、Hysteria 等多种协议，提供自动节点选择、TUN 模式、远程配置等功能。开源、安全、无广告，适用于跨平台网络访问和隐私保护。
summary.en: Hiddify App is a multi-platform proxy client based on Sing-box, supporting protocols like Vless, Vmess, Reality, TUIC, and Hysteria. It features automatic node selection, TUN mode, remote profiles, and is open-source, secure, and ad-free, ideal for cross-platform internet access and privacy.

metadata.name: brew
metadata.description: 🍺 The missing package manager for macOS (or Linux)

summary.zh: Homebrew 是 macOS 和 Linux 系统上缺失的包管理器，提供便捷的软件安装、更新和管理功能。它通过公式和桶机制支持大量开源软件，简化了系统依赖管理，广泛应用于开发环境和日常工具部署。
summary.en: Homebrew is the missing package manager for macOS and Linux, offering easy software installation, updates, and management. It supports a vast array of open-source software through formulas and casks, streamlining dependency management for development environments and daily tool deployment.

metadata.name: SafeLine
metadata.description: SafeLine is a self-hosted WAF(Web Application Firewall) / reverse proxy to protect your web apps from attacks and exploits.

summary.zh: SafeLine 是一款自托管 Web 应用防火墙（WAF）/反向代理，旨在保护 Web 应用免受 SQL 注入、XSS、暴力破解等多种攻击。它通过过滤和监控 HTTP/S 流量，提供主动防御、速率限制、反机器人挑战和动态代码加密等功能，适用于企业级安全防护和运维自动化场景。
summary.en: SafeLine is a self-hosted Web Application Firewall (WAF) / reverse proxy designed to protect web applications from attacks such as SQL injection, XSS, and brute force. It filters and monitors HTTP/S traffic, offering features like proactive defense, rate limiting, anti-bot challenges, and dynamic code encryption, suitable for enterprise security and operational automation.

metadata.name: go-retry
metadata.description: Go library for retrying with configurable backoffs

summary.zh: go-retry 是一个 Go 语言库，用于实现可配置退避策略的重试逻辑。它提供恒定、指数和斐波那契等内置退避算法，支持通过中间件添加抖动、最大重试次数和时长限制，具有无外部依赖、并发安全和上下文感知等特点，适用于网络请求、数据库连接等需要容错处理的场景。
summary.en: go-retry is a Go library for implementing retry logic with configurable backoff strategies. It offers built-in algorithms like constant, exponential, and Fibonacci backoffs, supports middleware for adding jitter, max retries, and duration limits, and features no external dependencies, concurrency safety, and context awareness, ideal for fault-tolerant scenarios such as network requests and database connections.

metadata.name: backoff
metadata.description: ⏱ The exponential backoff algorithm in Go

summary.zh: 这是一个Go语言实现的指数退避算法库，移植自Google的Java HTTP客户端库。它通过指数级增加重试间隔来优雅处理网络请求失败，适用于分布式系统和API调用等场景，确保服务稳定性和容错能力。
summary.en: This is a Go implementation of the exponential backoff algorithm, ported from Google's Java HTTP client library. It gracefully handles network request failures by exponentially increasing retry intervals, suitable for distributed systems and API calls to ensure service stability and fault tolerance.

metadata.name: DevToys
metadata.description: A Swiss Army knife for developers.

summary.zh: DevToys 是一款面向开发者的多功能桌面应用，集成了30多种常用工具，涵盖格式转换、编解码、数据生成和图形处理等场景。其核心亮点包括智能检测剪贴板内容自动匹配工具，以及支持扩展开发，提供高效、安全的本地化解决方案，替代不可靠的在线服务。
summary.en: DevToys is a versatile desktop application for developers, integrating over 30 essential tools for tasks like format conversion, encoding/decoding, data generation, and graphics processing. Key features include smart clipboard detection for automatic tool selection and extensibility through custom plugins, offering a secure, offline alternative to unreliable web services.

metadata.name: How-To-Secure-A-Linux-Server
metadata.description: An evolving how-to guide for securing a Linux server.

summary.zh: 这是一个关于如何保护Linux服务器的实用指南，涵盖从SSH安全、基础系统加固到网络防火墙和入侵检测的全面步骤。它旨在帮助用户理解安全原理并实施具体措施，适用于系统管理员和运维人员，强调实践性和教育性。
summary.en: This is a practical guide on securing a Linux server, covering comprehensive steps from SSH security, basic system hardening, to network firewalls and intrusion detection. It aims to help users understand security principles and implement specific measures, suitable for system administrators and operations personnel, emphasizing practicality and educational value.

metadata.name: Termix
metadata.description: Termix is a web-based server management platform with SSH terminal, tunneling, and file editing capabilities.

summary.zh: Termix 是一个开源的、永久免费的、自托管的服务器管理平台，提供基于 Web 的 SSH 终端、远程桌面控制（RDP、VNC、Telnet）、SSH 隧道管理和远程文件编辑功能。它支持多平台访问，通过直观的界面实现服务器和基础设施的统一管理，是 Termius 的免费自托管替代方案。
summary.en: Termix is an open-source, forever-free, self-hosted server management platform offering web-based SSH terminal, remote desktop control (RDP, VNC, Telnet), SSH tunneling, and remote file editing capabilities. It provides a multi-platform solution for unified server and infrastructure management through an intuitive interface, serving as a free self-hosted alternative to Termius.

metadata.name: apisix-dashboard
metadata.description: Dashboard for Apache APISIX

summary.zh: Apache APISIX Dashboard 是一个用于 Apache APISIX 的 Web 管理界面，旨在通过直观的前端界面简化用户对 API 网关的操作，支持配置路由、插件和服务等核心功能，提升运维效率和用户体验。
summary.en: Apache APISIX Dashboard is a web-based management interface for Apache APISIX, designed to simplify user operations on the API gateway through an intuitive frontend, enabling configuration of routes, plugins, and services to enhance operational efficiency and user experience.

metadata.name: ansible-ui
metadata.description: 轻量级，简单易用的Ansible Web管理面板，提供批量主机管理、运行剧本任务、命令执行、文件传输和Web终端等功能。

summary.zh: Ansible Web管理面板是一个轻量级、简单易用的Web界面，用于管理Ansible自动化运维工具。它提供批量主机管理、命令执行、文件传输、Playbook任务执行和Web终端等功能，适合初学者和运维人员快速上手，提升运维效率。
summary.en: Ansible Web Management Panel is a lightweight and user-friendly web interface for managing Ansible automation tools. It offers batch host management, command execution, file transfer, Playbook task execution, and web terminal features, making it ideal for beginners and operators to streamline IT operations.

metadata.name: BetterDisplay
metadata.description: Unlock your displays on your Mac! Flexible HiDPI scaling, XDR/HDR extra brightness, virtual screens, DDC control, extra dimming, PIP/streaming, EDID override and lots more!

summary.zh: BetterDisplay 是一款 macOS 显示管理工具，提供 HiDPI 缩放、XDR/HDR 亮度增强、虚拟屏幕、DDC 控制、画中画等功能，支持自定义分辨率和 EDID 覆盖，适用于提升 Mac 显示性能和用户体验。
summary.en: BetterDisplay is a macOS display management tool offering HiDPI scaling, XDR/HDR brightness enhancement, virtual screens, DDC control, Picture-in-Picture, and more, with support for custom resolutions and EDID overrides, designed to enhance Mac display performance and user experience.

metadata.name: blog_os
metadata.description: Writing an OS in Rust

summary.zh: 这是一个使用Rust语言编写操作系统的教程项目，通过系列博客文章提供从零开始的逐步指导。核心价值在于结合Rust的安全性与系统编程，涵盖内核开发、内存管理、中断处理等关键主题，适合学习操作系统原理和Rust系统级编程的开发者。
summary.en: This is a tutorial project for writing an operating system in Rust, offering step-by-step guidance through a series of blog posts. It leverages Rust's safety features for system programming, covering essential topics like kernel development, memory management, and interrupt handling, ideal for developers learning OS principles and Rust low-level programming.

metadata.name: kubeconform
metadata.description: A FAST Kubernetes manifests validator, with support for Custom Resources!

summary.zh: Kubeconform 是一个高性能的 Kubernetes 清单验证工具，专为 CI/CD 集成和本地使用设计。它通过多线程并行处理和内存缓存机制显著提升验证速度，支持自定义资源（CRD）和离线验证，并基于自更新的 Kubernetes JSON 模式库确保最新版本兼容性。
summary.en: Kubeconform is a high-performance Kubernetes manifest validation tool designed for CI/CD integration and local use. It significantly speeds up validation through multi-threaded parallel processing and in-memory caching, supports custom resources (CRDs) and offline validation, and ensures compatibility with the latest Kubernetes versions via a self-updating JSON schema repository.

metadata.name: syncthing
metadata.description: Open Source Continuous File Synchronization

summary.zh: Syncthing 是一款开源、去中心化的持续文件同步工具，专注于数据安全与隐私保护。它通过点对点加密技术，在多个设备间自动同步文件，无需依赖云服务器，适用于个人数据备份、跨平台文件共享等场景。核心优势包括防数据丢失、抗攻击、易用性和跨平台支持，采用 Go 语言开发，提供 GUI 界面和 Docker 部署选项。
summary.en: Syncthing is an open-source, decentralized continuous file synchronization tool that prioritizes data security and privacy. It automatically syncs files between multiple devices using peer-to-peer encryption, eliminating reliance on cloud servers, and is ideal for personal data backup and cross-platform file sharing. Key features include data loss prevention, attack resistance, ease of use, and cross-platform support, built with Go and offering GUI interfaces and Docker deployment.

metadata.name: sniffnet
metadata.description: Comfortably monitor your Internet traffic 🕵️‍♂️

summary.zh: Sniffnet 是一款跨平台网络流量监控应用，提供直观的图形界面，支持实时流量分析、数据包检查和自定义通知。它适用于个人用户和开发者监控网络活动，具备多语言界面和主题定制功能，强调易用性和可靠性。
summary.en: Sniffnet is a cross-platform application for monitoring Internet traffic with an intuitive graphical interface. It offers real-time traffic analysis, packet inspection, and customizable notifications, suitable for personal users and developers to track network activities, featuring multi-language support and theme customization with a focus on usability and reliability.

metadata.name: clash-rs
metadata.description: custom protocol network proxy

summary.zh: ClashRS 是一款基于 Rust 开发的网络代理软件，支持自定义协议和规则驱动，提供灵活的流量路由、本地防欺骗 DNS 及多种代理模式（如 HTTP/Socks5 和 utun 网关）。它兼容多种传输协议和跨平台环境，适用于网络代理、流量管理和安全访问场景。
summary.en: ClashRS is a network proxy software developed in Rust, featuring custom protocols and rule-based traffic routing with flexible DNS handling and multiple proxy modes (e.g., HTTP/Socks5 and utun gateway). It supports various transport protocols and cross-platform environments, ideal for network proxying, traffic management, and secure access.

metadata.name: kargo
metadata.description: Application lifecycle orchestration

summary.zh: Kargo 是基于 GitOps 原则的应用生命周期编排工具，专注于自动化管理软件制品在多阶段环境中的流转与部署。它提供直观的仪表板，支持企业级扩展，适用于构建高效、可观测的持续交付流水线。
summary.en: Kargo is an application lifecycle orchestration tool built on GitOps principles, automating the promotion of software artifacts across multiple stages. It features a user-friendly dashboard and supports enterprise-scale deployments, ideal for building efficient and observable continuous delivery pipelines.

metadata.name: defaults
metadata.description: Initialize structs with default values

summary.zh: defaults 是一个 Go 语言库，用于为结构体字段自动设置默认值。它支持标量、复杂、嵌套、别名和指针类型，通过标签定义默认值，并递归初始化嵌套结构。核心特性包括动态设置默认值（通过 defaults.Setter 接口）和避免覆盖非零值，适用于配置管理、数据初始化等场景，提升开发效率。
summary.en: defaults is a Go library for automatically setting default values to struct fields. It supports scalar, complex, nested, aliased, and pointer types, defines defaults via tags, and recursively initializes nested structs. Key features include dynamic default setting (via defaults.Setter interface) and preserving non-zero values, making it ideal for configuration management and data initialization to enhance development efficiency.

metadata.name: mise
metadata.description: dev tools, env vars, task runner

summary.zh: mise 是一个现代化的开发环境管理工具，集成了开发工具版本管理、环境变量配置和任务运行功能。它类似于 asdf、direnv 和 make 的结合体，支持数百种工具如 Node.js、Python 和 Terraform，通过统一界面简化多语言项目配置，提升开发效率。
summary.en: mise is a modern development environment management tool that integrates version control for dev tools, environment variable configuration, and task running. It combines features similar to asdf, direnv, and make, supporting hundreds of tools like Node.js, Python, and Terraform, streamlining multi-language project setup through a unified interface to enhance development productivity.

metadata.name: borg
metadata.description: Deduplicating archiver with compression and authenticated encryption.

summary.zh: BorgBackup 是一款高效安全的去重备份工具，通过内容定义分块技术实现数据去重，仅存储变化内容，适合日常备份。支持客户端加密、多种压缩算法和SSH远程存储，可将备份挂载为文件系统便于查看和恢复。
summary.en: BorgBackup is an efficient and secure deduplicating backup tool that uses content-defined chunking to store only changed data, ideal for daily backups. It features client-side encryption, multiple compression algorithms, SSH remote storage, and mountable backups as file systems for easy access and recovery.

metadata.name: OpenList
metadata.description: A new AList Fork to Anti Trust Crisis

summary.zh: OpenList是AList的社区驱动分叉，旨在通过弹性治理和开源透明性抵御信任攻击。它支持多种云存储服务（如阿里云盘、OneDrive、Google Drive等），提供文件管理和WebDAV访问，强调长期可持续性和开源生态健康。
summary.en: OpenList is a community-driven fork of AList, designed to defend open source against trust-based attacks through resilient governance and transparency. It supports multiple cloud storage services (e.g., Aliyundrive, OneDrive, Google Drive) for file management and WebDAV access, emphasizing long-term sustainability and ecosystem health.

metadata.name: gitstars
metadata.description: Github Starred Repositories Manager

summary.zh: Gitstars 是一个专为开发者设计的 GitHub 星标仓库管理器，旨在解决星标项目增长后难以查找的问题。它通过按主题和编程语言自动分类星标仓库，支持快速搜索和预览 README.md，无需跳转至 GitHub。核心功能包括每日更新的 GitHub 星标排名榜单，帮助用户发现热门项目，提升开源项目管理效率。
summary.en: Gitstars is a GitHub starred repositories manager designed for developers to address the challenge of finding starred projects as they accumulate. It automatically categorizes starred repositories by topics and programming languages, enabling quick search and README.md preview without redirecting to GitHub. Key features include a daily-updated GitHub stars ranking list to discover trending projects, enhancing open-source project management efficiency.

metadata.name: container
metadata.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.

summary.zh: `container` 是苹果官方开发的工具，用于在搭载 Apple silicon 的 Mac 上通过轻量级虚拟机创建和运行 Linux 容器。它基于 Swift 编写，支持 OCI 兼容容器镜像，可在 macOS 26 及以上版本中利用虚拟化和网络增强功能，实现高效容器管理。
summary.en: `container` is an official Apple tool for creating and running Linux containers as lightweight virtual machines on Macs with Apple silicon. Written in Swift, it supports OCI-compatible container images and leverages virtualization and networking enhancements in macOS 26 and above for efficient container management.

metadata.name: blinko
metadata.description: An open-source, self-hosted personal AI note tool prioritizing privacy, built using TypeScript .

summary.zh: Blinko 是一款开源、自托管的个人 AI 笔记工具，专注于隐私保护。它采用 TypeScript 和 Tauri 构建，支持多平台部署，通过 AI 增强的 RAG 技术实现自然语言检索笔记，帮助用户快速捕捉和组织灵感。
summary.en: Blinko is an open-source, self-hosted personal AI note-taking tool that prioritizes privacy. Built with TypeScript and Tauri, it supports multi-platform deployment and uses AI-enhanced RAG for natural language note retrieval, enabling users to quickly capture and organize ideas.

metadata.name: server
metadata.description: A simple server for sending and receiving messages in real-time per WebSocket. (Includes a sleek web-ui)

summary.zh: Gotify/server 是一个基于 WebSocket 的实时消息推送服务器，支持自托管，提供 REST API 发送消息和 WebSocket 接收消息。核心功能包括用户、客户端和应用管理，附带简洁的 Web UI，并支持插件扩展，适用于个人或小型团队的轻量级通知系统。
summary.en: Gotify/server is a real-time message push server based on WebSocket, supporting self-hosting with REST API for sending messages and WebSocket for receiving. Key features include user, client, and application management, a sleek web UI, and plugin extensibility, ideal for lightweight notification systems in personal or small team scenarios.

metadata.name: python-mastery
metadata.description: Advanced Python Mastery (course by @dabeaz)

summary.zh: 《高级Python精通》是由David Beazley设计的进阶Python编程课程，专注于提升开发者从脚本编写到构建复杂程序的能力。课程通过实战练习深入讲解Python核心机制，如生成器、协程和元编程，适用于希望深入理解Python语言内部工作原理并应用于实际项目的程序员。
summary.en: Advanced Python Mastery is a course by David Beazley designed to elevate Python programmers from writing short scripts to developing sophisticated applications. It focuses on in-depth exercises covering core Python mechanisms like generators, coroutines, and metaprogramming, ideal for those seeking to build a comprehensive mental model of the language for real-world projects.

metadata.name: openresty-manager
metadata.description: Modern, secure, and elegant server control panel, alternative to OpenResty Edge and Nginx Proxy Manager.

summary.zh: OpenResty Manager 是一款现代化、安全且优雅的服务器控制面板，作为 OpenResty Edge 和 Nginx Proxy Manager 的开源替代方案。它通过 Web 界面简化 OpenResty 管理，提供访问控制、DDoS 防护、身份认证等安全功能，支持免费 SSL 证书自动申请与续期，并集成主机管理、Web 终端、文件管理、应用商店和容器管理，降低网站搭建和运维难度。
summary.en: OpenResty Manager is a modern, secure, and elegant server control panel, serving as an open-source alternative to OpenResty Edge and Nginx Proxy Manager. It simplifies OpenResty management via a web interface, offering security features like access control, DDoS protection, and authentication, supports automatic application and renewal of free SSL certificates, and integrates host management, web terminal, file management, app marketplace, and container management to reduce website deployment and operational complexity.

metadata.name: json-to-go
metadata.description: Translates JSON into a Go type in your browser instantly (original)

summary.zh: JSON-to-Go 是一款在浏览器中即时将 JSON 数据转换为 Go 结构体定义的工具，专为 Go 开发者设计，简化了 API 集成和数据建模过程。它基于 JavaScript 实现，支持从文件或标准输入读取 JSON，并自动推断类型，但需用户复核输出以确保准确性。
summary.en: JSON-to-Go is a browser-based tool that instantly converts JSON data into Go struct definitions, tailored for Go developers to streamline API integration and data modeling. Built with JavaScript, it reads JSON from files or stdin, infers types automatically, but requires user review for accuracy.

metadata.name: NTrace-core
metadata.description: NextTrace, an open source visual route tracking CLI tool

summary.zh: NextTrace 是一个开源的可视化路由追踪 CLI 工具，采用 Golang 开发，追求轻量级设计。它提供直观的网络路径可视化，适用于网络诊断、运维监控和性能分析等场景，支持跨平台部署，通过自动化安装脚本简化使用流程。
summary.en: NextTrace is an open-source visual route tracking CLI tool developed in Golang, emphasizing lightweight design. It offers intuitive network path visualization for scenarios like network diagnostics, operational monitoring, and performance analysis, with cross-platform deployment and automated installation scripts for ease of use.

metadata.name: homepage
metadata.description: A highly customizable homepage (or startpage / application dashboard) with Docker and service API integrations.

summary.zh: Homepage 是一个高度可定制的现代化应用仪表盘，专为 Docker 和自托管服务设计。它提供静态生成、快速加载、安全代理的 API 集成，支持超过 100 种服务自动发现和多语言界面，通过 YAML 配置或 Docker 标签实现轻松部署，适用于个人和团队的高效运维管理。
summary.en: Homepage is a highly customizable modern application dashboard designed for Docker and self-hosted services. It features static generation for fast loading, secure proxied API integrations, support for over 100 services with automatic discovery, and multi-language interfaces, easily configured via YAML or Docker labels, ideal for efficient personal and team operations management.

metadata.name: Scraperr
metadata.description: Self-hosted webscraper.

summary.zh: Scraperr 是一个强大的自托管网页爬虫解决方案，无需编写代码即可抓取网站数据。它支持基于 XPath 的精确元素提取、队列管理、域名爬取、自定义请求头、媒体下载和结果可视化，并可将数据导出为 Markdown 和 CSV 格式。适用于数据采集、内容监控和自动化分析场景，强调遵守 robots.txt 和伦理准则。
summary.en: Scraperr is a powerful self-hosted web scraping solution that enables data extraction from websites without writing code. It features XPath-based element targeting, job queue management, domain spidering, custom headers, media downloads, and result visualization with export to Markdown and CSV. Ideal for data collection, content monitoring, and automated analysis, with a focus on respecting robots.txt and ethical guidelines.

metadata.name: markitdown
metadata.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

summary.zh: MarkItDown 是微软开发的轻量级 Python 工具，专注于将 PDF、Office 文档、图像、音频等多种文件格式转换为 Markdown，旨在为 LLM 和文本分析管道提供结构化的输入。它通过保留标题、列表、表格等关键文档结构，优化了 AI 处理效率，并支持 MCP 服务器集成，便于与 Claude Desktop 等 LLM 应用无缝协作。
summary.en: MarkItDown is a lightweight Python utility developed by Microsoft, designed to convert various file formats such as PDF, Office documents, images, and audio into Markdown for LLMs and text analysis pipelines. It preserves essential document structures like headings, lists, and tables to enhance AI processing efficiency, and includes MCP server integration for seamless use with LLM applications like Claude Desktop.

metadata.name: note-gen
metadata.description: A cross-platform Markdown AI note-taking software.

summary.zh: NoteGen是一款跨平台Markdown笔记软件，通过AI智能体将碎片化信息转化为结构化笔记，支持RAG和MCP集成，实现轻量级、免费、无广告的智能笔记体验。
summary.en: NoteGen is a cross-platform Markdown note-taking application that uses AI agents to transform fragmented information into structured notes, featuring RAG and MCP support for a lightweight, free, and ad-free intelligent note-taking experience.

metadata.name: slidev
metadata.description: Presentation Slides for Developers

summary.zh: Slidev 是一款专为开发者设计的演示文稿工具，基于 Markdown 语法，支持实时编码、主题定制和 Vue 组件嵌入。它集成了 LaTeX 数学公式、Mermaid 图表和 UnoCSS 样式，提供录制、导出和跨设备控制功能，适用于技术演讲和教学场景。
summary.en: Slidev is a presentation tool designed for developers, leveraging Markdown syntax with features like live coding, theme customization, and Vue component integration. It includes LaTeX math equations, Mermaid diagrams, and UnoCSS styling, offering recording, export options, and cross-device control, ideal for technical talks and educational purposes.

metadata.name: apollo
metadata.description: Apollo is a reliable configuration management system suitable for microservice configuration management scenarios.

summary.zh: Apollo是一个可靠的配置管理系统，专为微服务架构设计，提供集中式配置管理。它支持多环境、多集群的统一管理，具备实时配置热更新、灰度发布、版本管理和权限控制等核心功能，基于Spring Boot/Cloud开发，提供Java和.Net SDK，适用于大规模分布式系统的配置治理。
summary.en: Apollo is a reliable configuration management system designed for microservices, offering centralized configuration management. It supports unified management across multiple environments and clusters, with core features like real-time hot updates, grayscale releases, version control, and permission management. Built on Spring Boot/Cloud, it provides Java and .Net SDKs, suitable for large-scale distributed systems.

metadata.name: docker-kms
metadata.description: Activate any version of Windows and Office, forever

summary.zh: 这是一个基于Docker的KMS服务器镜像，用于永久激活Windows和Office的批量授权版本。它支持从Vista到Windows 11及Server 2008到2025的广泛系统，以及Office 2010到2024，提供Web GUI界面和Docker Compose部署方案，简化了本地或网络环境中的软件激活管理。
summary.en: This is a Docker-based KMS server image designed for permanently activating volume license versions of Windows and Office. It supports a wide range of systems from Vista to Windows 11 and Server 2008 to 2025, as well as Office 2010 to 2024, featuring a Web GUI and Docker Compose deployment for streamlined software activation management in local or network environments.

metadata.name: k3s
metadata.description: Lightweight Kubernetes

summary.zh: K3s 是一个轻量级、生产就绪的 Kubernetes 发行版，专为边缘计算、物联网和资源受限环境设计。它打包为单个二进制文件，内存占用减半，支持 SQLite 等存储后端，简化安装和运维，适用于开发、CI/CD 和嵌入式场景。
summary.en: K3s is a lightweight, production-ready Kubernetes distribution designed for edge computing, IoT, and resource-constrained environments. Packaged as a single binary with half the memory footprint, it supports storage backends like SQLite, simplifying installation and operations for development, CI/CD, and embedded use cases.

metadata.name: maily.to
metadata.description: Craft beautiful emails effortlessly with Maily, the powerful email editor that ensures impeccable communication across all major clients.

summary.zh: Maily.to 是一个强大的电子邮件编辑器，专注于帮助用户轻松创建美观、预设计且移动端友好的邮件。它提供丰富的预设计组件，如按钮、变量、图片和布局工具，确保邮件在所有主流客户端中完美显示，简化了跨平台邮件设计的复杂性。
summary.en: Maily.to is a powerful email editor designed to effortlessly create beautiful, pre-designed, and mobile-ready emails. It offers a rich set of pre-designed components, such as buttons, variables, images, and layout tools, ensuring flawless display across all major email clients and simplifying cross-platform email design.

metadata.name: ZeroOmega
metadata.description: Manage and switch between multiple proxies quickly & easily.

summary.zh: ZeroOmega 是一款基于 SwitchyOmega 的浏览器代理管理扩展，兼容 Manifest V3，支持 Chrome、Edge 和 Firefox。它提供快速切换和管理多个代理的功能，适用于网络调试、隐私保护和跨区域访问等场景。技术亮点包括模块化架构、PAC 脚本生成和跨平台 WebExtension 实现。
summary.en: ZeroOmega is a browser proxy management extension forked from SwitchyOmega, compatible with Manifest V3 and available for Chrome, Edge, and Firefox. It enables quick switching and management of multiple proxies, ideal for network debugging, privacy protection, and cross-region access. Key technical features include a modular architecture, PAC script generation, and cross-platform WebExtension implementation.

metadata.name: maple-font
metadata.description: Maple Mono: Open source monospace font with round corner, ligatures and Nerd-Font icons for IDE and terminal, fine-grained customization options. 带连字和控制台图标的圆角等宽字体，中英文宽度完美2:1，细粒度的自定义选项

summary.zh: Maple Mono 是一款开源等宽字体，专为编程和终端设计，具有圆角、智能连字和 Nerd-Font 图标支持。其核心亮点包括中英文宽度完美 2:1 对齐，适用于多语言显示和 Markdown 表格，提供变量字体格式和细粒度自定义选项，增强开发体验。
summary.en: Maple Mono is an open-source monospace font designed for coding and terminal use, featuring rounded corners, smart ligatures, and Nerd-Font icon support. Key highlights include perfect 2:1 alignment between Chinese and English characters for multilingual displays and Markdown tables, with variable font format and fine-grained customization options to enhance developer workflow.

metadata.name: docmost
metadata.description: Docmost is an open-source collaborative wiki and documentation software. It is an open-source alternative to Confluence and Notion.

summary.zh: Docmost 是一款开源的协作式 Wiki 和文档软件，作为 Confluence 和 Notion 的替代方案，支持实时协作、图表绘制、权限管理和多语言翻译，适用于团队知识管理和文档共享。
summary.en: Docmost is an open-source collaborative wiki and documentation software, serving as an alternative to Confluence and Notion, featuring real-time collaboration, diagram integration, permission management, and multi-language support for team knowledge management and document sharing.

metadata.name: WSL
metadata.description: Windows Subsystem for Linux

summary.zh: Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) 是一个在 Windows 上直接运行原生 Linux 命令行工具和应用程序的子系统，无需虚拟机或双启动，提供高效、无缝的跨平台开发体验。它支持安装、配置和运行完整的 Linux 环境，适用于开发、测试和运维场景，技术亮点包括轻量级架构、与 Windows 深度集成以及开源社区支持。
summary.en: Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) is a subsystem that enables running native Linux command-line tools and applications directly on Windows without the overhead of a virtual machine or dual-boot setup. It offers an efficient, seamless cross-platform development experience, supporting installation, configuration, and full Linux environments for development, testing, and operations, with key features including lightweight architecture, deep integration with Windows, and open-source community support.

metadata.name: browser-use
metadata.description: 🌐 Make websites accessible for AI agents. Automate tasks online with ease.

summary.zh: Browser-Use 是一个专为 AI 智能体设计的浏览器自动化工具，使 AI 能够通过自然语言指令访问和操作网站，实现网页爬虫、数据提取和在线任务自动化。它支持多种大模型集成，提供本地和云端部署选项，简化了 AI 与网页交互的开发流程。
summary.en: Browser-Use is a browser automation tool designed for AI agents, enabling AI to access and manipulate websites via natural language instructions for tasks like web scraping, data extraction, and online automation. It supports integration with multiple large language models and offers both local and cloud deployment options, streamlining AI-web interaction development.

metadata.name: gixy
metadata.description: Nginx configuration static analyzer

summary.zh: Gixy 是一个 Nginx 配置静态分析工具，旨在自动化检测安全配置缺陷，如 SSRF、HTTP 拆分和路径遍历等漏洞。它通过 Python 实现，支持多种版本，提供命令行和 Docker 部署方式，帮助运维人员提升 Web 服务器安全性。
summary.en: Gixy is a static analyzer for Nginx configurations, designed to automate the detection of security misconfigurations such as SSRF, HTTP splitting, and path traversal vulnerabilities. Implemented in Python with support for multiple versions, it offers command-line and Docker deployment options to enhance web server security for operations teams.

metadata.name: timeshift
metadata.description: System restore tool for Linux. Creates filesystem snapshots using rsync+hardlinks, or BTRFS snapshots. Supports scheduled snapshots, multiple backup levels, and exclude filters. Snapshots can be restored while system is running or from Live CD/USB.

summary.zh: Timeshift 是一款 Linux 系统恢复工具，通过 rsync+硬链接或 BTRFS 快照创建文件系统快照，支持定时备份、多级保留和排除过滤。它专注于保护系统文件和设置，默认排除用户数据，确保恢复时个人文件不受影响，适用于系统故障恢复和版本回滚。
summary.en: Timeshift is a Linux system restore tool that creates filesystem snapshots using rsync+hardlinks or BTRFS snapshots, with support for scheduled backups, multiple retention levels, and exclude filters. It focuses on protecting system files and settings while excluding user data by default, making it ideal for system recovery and rollback scenarios.

metadata.name: shadPS4
metadata.description: PlayStation 4 emulator for Windows, Linux and macOS written in C++

summary.zh: shadPS4 是一款用 C++ 编写的 PlayStation 4 模拟器，支持 Windows、Linux 和 macOS 平台。该项目处于早期开发阶段，能够运行《血源诅咒》等游戏，核心功能专注于模拟器引擎，不包含图形用户界面，需配合 QtLauncher 使用。
summary.en: shadPS4 is a PlayStation 4 emulator written in C++, compatible with Windows, Linux, and macOS. It is in early development, capable of running games like Bloodborne, and focuses on the emulator core without a GUI, requiring the QtLauncher for end-user interaction.

metadata.name: Foundations-of-LLMs
metadata.description: A book for Learning the Foundations of LLMs

summary.zh: 《大模型基础》是一本系统讲解大语言模型基础知识和前沿技术的开源教材，涵盖传统语言模型、架构演化、Prompt工程、参数高效微调、模型编辑和检索增强生成等核心内容。本书以动物背景举例增强易读性，并提供月度更新和论文列表，适合学习、科研和教学使用。
summary.en: Foundations of LLMs is an open-source textbook that systematically explains the fundamentals and cutting-edge technologies of large language models, covering traditional language models, architecture evolution, prompt engineering, parameter-efficient fine-tuning, model editing, and retrieval-augmented generation. It uses animal-themed examples for readability, offers monthly updates and paper lists, and is ideal for learning, research, and teaching.

metadata.name: chinese-poetry
metadata.description: The most comprehensive database of Chinese poetry 🧶最全中华古诗词数据库,  唐宋两朝近一万四千古诗人,  接近5.5万首唐诗加26万宋诗.  两宋时期1564位词人，21050首词。

summary.zh: chinese-poetry 是一个全面的中华古典诗歌数据库，包含约5.5万首唐诗、26万首宋诗和2.1万首宋词等，覆盖唐宋时期近1.4万诗人。数据以JSON格式提供，便于开发者快速构建诗词应用，支持文化传承和学术研究。
summary.en: chinese-poetry is a comprehensive database of classical Chinese poetry, including approximately 55,000 Tang poems, 260,000 Song poems, and 21,000 Song lyrics, covering nearly 14,000 poets from the Tang and Song dynasties. The data is provided in JSON format, enabling developers to easily build poetry-related applications for cultural preservation and academic research.

metadata.name: ruff
metadata.description: An extremely fast Python linter and code formatter, written in Rust.

summary.zh: Ruff 是一个用 Rust 编写的高性能 Python 代码检查器和格式化工具，速度比现有工具快 10-100 倍。它集成了 Flake8、Black、isort 等工具的功能，支持自动修复、缓存和超过 800 条规则，适用于大型项目和持续集成环境，提升开发效率。
summary.en: Ruff is an extremely fast Python linter and code formatter written in Rust, offering 10-100x speed improvements over existing tools. It integrates functionalities from Flake8, Black, isort, and more, with features like auto-fix, caching, and over 800 built-in rules, ideal for large-scale projects and CI/CD workflows to enhance development productivity.

metadata.name: PDFMathTranslate
metadata.description: [EMNLP 2025 Demo] PDF scientific paper translation with preserved formats - 基于 AI 完整保留排版的 PDF 文档全文双语翻译，支持 Google/DeepL/Ollama/OpenAI 等服务，提供 CLI/GUI/MCP/Docker/Zotero

summary.zh: PDFMathTranslate 是一款基于 AI 的 PDF 科学论文翻译工具，完整保留公式、图表、目录和注释等排版格式，支持 Google/DeepL/Ollama/OpenAI 等多种翻译服务，提供 CLI/GUI/Docker/Zotero 等多种部署方式，适用于学术研究和文档处理场景。
summary.en: PDFMathTranslate is an AI-powered PDF scientific paper translation tool that preserves layout formats such as formulas, charts, table of contents, and annotations. It supports multiple translation services like Google/DeepL/Ollama/OpenAI and offers various deployment options including CLI/GUI/Docker/Zotero, ideal for academic research and document processing.

metadata.name: mermaid
metadata.description: Generation of diagrams like flowcharts or sequence diagrams from text in a similar manner as markdown

summary.zh: Mermaid 是一个基于 JavaScript 的图表生成工具，通过类似 Markdown 的文本语法，自动创建流程图、序列图等复杂图表。它简化了文档编写流程，支持实时编辑和跨平台集成，广泛应用于技术文档、项目管理和可视化展示，提升开发效率和协作质量。
summary.en: Mermaid is a JavaScript-based diagramming tool that generates complex diagrams like flowcharts and sequence diagrams from Markdown-like text syntax. It streamlines documentation workflows, supports live editing and cross-platform integration, and is widely used in technical documentation, project management, and visualization to enhance development efficiency and collaboration.

metadata.name: kom
metadata.description: kom 是一个用于 Kubernetes 操作的工具，SDK级的kubectl、client-go的使用封装。并且支持作为管理k8s 的 MCP server。 它提供了一系列功能来管理 Kubernetes 资源，包括创建、更新、删除和获取资源，甚至使用SQL查询k8s资源。这个项目支持多种 Kubernetes 资源类型的操作，并能够处理自定义资源定义（CRD）。 通过使用 kom，你可以轻松地进行资源的增删改查和日志获取以及操作POD内文件等动作。

summary.zh: Kom 是一个用于 Kubernetes 操作的 SDK 级工具，封装了 kubectl 和 client-go，提供资源增删改查、SQL 查询、Pod 文件操作等功能。它支持多集群管理、MCP 服务器模式（含 58 种工具），并内置 Prometheus 查询和缓存机制，适用于自动化运维和 AI 智能体集成。
summary.en: Kom is an SDK-level tool for Kubernetes operations, encapsulating kubectl and client-go to provide resource CRUD, SQL querying, Pod file operations, and more. It supports multi-cluster management, MCP server mode (with 58 tools), and includes built-in Prometheus querying and caching, suitable for automation and AI agent integration.

metadata.name: frpc-desktop
metadata.description: frp跨平台桌面客户端，可视化配置，轻松实现内网穿透！ 支持所有frp版本

summary.zh: Frpc-Desktop 是一款跨平台桌面客户端，专为 FRP 内网穿透工具设计，提供可视化配置界面，简化复杂网络设置。支持所有 FRP 版本，具备自动启动、多语言支持、配置导入导出等功能，适用于个人开发者、企业运维等场景，提升内网穿透的易用性和效率。
summary.en: Frpc-Desktop is a cross-platform desktop client for the FRP intranet penetration tool, offering a visual configuration interface to simplify complex network setups. It supports all FRP versions, with features like auto-start, multi-language support, and configuration import/export, making it ideal for individual developers and enterprise operations to enhance usability and efficiency in intranet penetration.

metadata.name: macos
metadata.description: MacOS inside a Docker container.

summary.zh: dockur/macos 是一个在 Docker 容器中运行 macOS 系统的开源项目，支持 KVM 加速和基于 Web 的图形界面，适用于开发测试、跨平台应用验证和虚拟化环境部署。
summary.en: dockur/macos is an open-source project that runs macOS inside a Docker container, featuring KVM acceleration and a web-based viewer, ideal for development testing, cross-platform application validation, and virtualization deployments.

metadata.name: terraform
metadata.description: Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

summary.zh: Terraform 是一款基础设施即代码工具，通过声明式配置安全高效地构建、变更和管理云基础设施。它支持执行计划预览、资源依赖图并行化与变更自动化，实现团队协作、版本控制和跨平台部署。
summary.en: Terraform is an Infrastructure as Code tool that enables safe and efficient building, changing, and management of cloud infrastructure through declarative configurations. It features execution plans, resource graph parallelization, and change automation for team collaboration, version control, and cross-platform deployment.

metadata.name: OliveTin
metadata.description: OliveTin gives safe and simple access to predefined shell commands from a web interface.

summary.zh: OliveTin 是一个通过 Web 界面安全、简单地访问预定义 Shell 命令的工具，适用于家庭自动化、服务器管理和团队协作等场景。它提供响应式 UI、YAML 配置和轻量级资源占用，核心亮点是简化复杂命令操作并确保安全性。
summary.en: OliveTin provides safe and simple access to predefined shell commands via a web interface, ideal for home automation, server management, and team collaboration. It features a responsive UI, YAML configuration, and lightweight resource usage, with a focus on simplifying complex commands while ensuring security.

metadata.name: kubernetes-the-hard-way
metadata.description: Bootstrap Kubernetes the hard way. No scripts.

summary.zh: 本教程通过手动配置Kubernetes集群的每个核心组件，深入讲解其底层原理与架构，适用于希望掌握Kubernetes基础知识和运维细节的学习者。它强调无脚本操作，涵盖从证书生成到节点引导的全过程，帮助用户理解集群构建的完整流程。
summary.en: This tutorial provides a manual, step-by-step guide to bootstrapping a Kubernetes cluster, focusing on understanding the underlying components and architecture. It is designed for learners who want to grasp Kubernetes fundamentals, covering tasks from certificate generation to node bootstrapping without automation scripts.

metadata.name: hugo-PaperMod
metadata.description: A fast, clean, responsive Hugo theme.
