summary.zh: Hugo PaperMod 是一个基于 Hugo 的现代化静态博客主题，以其快速、简洁和响应式设计为核心。它提供多种模式（常规、主页信息、个人资料）、内置 SEO 优化、多语言支持、暗黑/亮色主题切换，以及无需依赖 Node.js 等外部工具的特性，适用于个人博客和文档网站。
summary.en: Hugo PaperMod is a modern static blog theme for Hugo, emphasizing speed, cleanliness, and responsiveness. It offers multiple modes (regular, home-info, profile), built-in SEO optimization, multilingual support, dark/light theme switching, and no dependencies like Node.js, ideal for personal blogs and documentation sites.

metadata.name: gojenkins
metadata.description: Jenkins API Client in Go. Looking for maintainers to move this project forward.

summary.zh: GoJenkins 是一个用 Go 语言编写的 Jenkins API 客户端库，提供开发者友好的方式与 Jenkins 持续集成系统交互。核心功能包括查询和管理节点、作业、构建、插件等，支持自动化操作如启动/停止节点、触发构建、验证指纹等。适用于 DevOps 和 CI/CD 自动化场景，简化 Jenkins 集成开发。
summary.en: GoJenkins is a Go library for interacting with the Jenkins Continuous Integration system via its API. It offers developer-friendly features for querying and managing nodes, jobs, builds, plugins, and more, enabling automation tasks like starting/stopping nodes, triggering builds, and validating fingerprints. Ideal for DevOps and CI/CD automation, streamlining Jenkins integration in Go applications.

metadata.name: kruise
metadata.description: Automated management of large-scale applications on Kubernetes (incubating project under CNCF)

summary.zh: OpenKruise 是一个 CNCF 孵化项目，专注于在 Kubernetes 上自动化管理大规模应用。它通过扩展原生控制器，提供高级工作负载（如 CloneSet、Advanced StatefulSet）、Sidecar 容器管理、多域管理和增强操作等功能，支持原地更新、可配置策略和并行操作，提升应用部署与运维效率。
summary.en: OpenKruise is a CNCF incubating project that automates the management of large-scale applications on Kubernetes. It extends native controllers with advanced workloads (e.g., CloneSet, Advanced StatefulSet), sidecar container management, multi-domain management, and enhanced operations, supporting in-place updates, configurable strategies, and parallel operations to improve deployment and operational efficiency.

metadata.name: go-learning
metadata.description: A learning and practise map for OpenStack, kubernetes, golang and the others.

summary.zh: Go-Learning 是一个面向有 Kubernetes 基础的学习者，提供 OpenStack、Kubernetes、Golang 和 Rust 等技术的实践指南和源码分析。核心内容包括 Kubernetes 功能增强工具、快速部署方案、自动扩缩容机制，以及丰富的代码示例和深度解析，帮助用户提升云原生和系统编程技能。
summary.en: Go-Learning is a practice-oriented guide for learners with Kubernetes experience, covering OpenStack, Kubernetes, Golang, and Rust. It offers tools for Kubernetes enhancement, rapid deployment, auto-scaling, and extensive code examples with in-depth analysis to advance cloud-native and system programming skills.

metadata.name: beszel
metadata.description: Lightweight server monitoring hub with historical data, docker stats, and alerts.

summary.zh: Beszel 是一个轻量级服务器监控平台，提供历史数据追踪、Docker 容器统计和可配置告警功能。它具备友好的 Web 界面、简单配置和开箱即用特性，支持自动备份、多用户管理、OAuth 认证和 API 访问，适用于中小型服务器运维场景。
summary.en: Beszel is a lightweight server monitoring platform that tracks historical data, Docker container statistics, and configurable alerts. It features a user-friendly web interface, easy setup, and out-of-the-box readiness, supporting automatic backups, multi-user management, OAuth authentication, and API access, ideal for small to medium server operations.

metadata.name: Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
metadata.description: Remove large amounts of unwanted applications quickly.

summary.zh: Bulk Crap Uninstaller (BCUninstaller) 是一款免费开源的批量程序卸载工具，专为高效清理Windows系统上的大量应用程序而设计。它支持多种卸载系统（如NSIS、InnoSetup、Msiexec），可自动清理残留文件、检测孤立应用，并提供便携版和安装版选项，适合IT专业人士和普通用户快速管理软件。
summary.en: Bulk Crap Uninstaller (BCUninstaller) is a free, open-source batch program uninstaller designed for efficiently removing large numbers of applications on Windows systems. It supports various uninstall systems (e.g., NSIS, InnoSetup, Msiexec), automatically cleans up leftovers, detects orphaned apps, and offers portable and setup versions, making it ideal for IT professionals and general users to manage software quickly.

metadata.name: aria2
metadata.description: aria2 is a lightweight multi-protocol & multi-source, cross platform download utility operated in command-line. It supports HTTP/HTTPS, FTP, SFTP, BitTorrent and Metalink.

summary.zh: aria2 是一款轻量级、多协议、多源、跨平台的命令行下载工具，支持 HTTP/HTTPS、FTP、SFTP、BitTorrent 和 Metalink。它通过分段下载和智能带宽利用，实现高速下载，并支持 JSON-RPC/XML-RPC 接口，适用于自动化下载和服务器环境。
summary.en: aria2 is a lightweight, multi-protocol, multi-source, cross-platform command-line download utility supporting HTTP/HTTPS, FTP, SFTP, BitTorrent, and Metalink. It enables high-speed downloads via segmented downloading and bandwidth optimization, with JSON-RPC/XML-RPC interfaces for automation and server use.

metadata.name: resty
metadata.description: Simple HTTP, REST, and SSE client library for Go

summary.zh: Resty 是一个简单易用的 Go 语言 HTTP、REST 和 SSE 客户端库，专为简化网络请求而设计。它支持现代 Go 版本，提供丰富的功能如自动重试、超时设置和响应处理，适用于微服务、API 集成和实时数据流场景，提升开发效率。
summary.en: Resty is a simple and easy-to-use HTTP, REST, and SSE client library for Go, designed to simplify network requests. It supports modern Go versions and offers features like automatic retries, timeout settings, and response handling, making it ideal for microservices, API integrations, and real-time data streaming, enhancing development productivity.

metadata.name: viper
metadata.description: Go configuration with fangs

summary.zh: Viper 是一个功能强大的 Go 语言配置管理库，专为处理复杂配置需求而设计。它支持多种配置源（如文件、环境变量、命令行标志、远程存储），提供动态加载、实时更新和优先级合并功能，适用于 12-Factor 应用和大型项目，简化配置管理并提升开发效率。
summary.en: Viper is a powerful configuration management library for Go, designed to handle complex configuration needs. It supports multiple sources (e.g., files, environment variables, command-line flags, remote stores), offers dynamic loading, live updates, and priority merging, making it ideal for 12-Factor apps and large-scale projects to streamline configuration management and boost development efficiency.

metadata.name: RunCat365
metadata.description: A cute running cat animation on your windows taskbar.

summary.zh: RunCat 365 是一款在 Windows 任务栏显示可爱奔跑猫咪动画的桌面应用，通过 C# 和 Win32 API 实现，提供多语言支持，适用于美化桌面和增添趣味性。
summary.en: RunCat 365 is a desktop application that displays a cute running cat animation on the Windows taskbar, built with C# and Win32 API, offering multilingual support for desktop customization and fun enhancement.

metadata.name: guide
metadata.description: The Uber Go Style Guide.

summary.zh: Uber Go 风格指南是 Uber 公司内部 Go 语言代码的官方规范，详细记录了 Go 编程的最佳实践、模式和约定。它旨在提升代码质量、可维护性和团队协作效率，适用于 Go 开发者遵循企业级编码标准，并已被社区广泛翻译为多种语言。
summary.en: The Uber Go Style Guide is Uber's official specification for Go code, documenting best practices, patterns, and conventions. It aims to enhance code quality, maintainability, and team collaboration, serving Go developers in adhering to enterprise-level coding standards, with community translations available in multiple languages.

metadata.name: cobra
metadata.description: A Commander for modern Go CLI interactions

summary.zh: Cobra 是一个用于创建强大现代命令行界面（CLI）应用程序的 Go 库，广泛应用于 Kubernetes、Hugo 和 GitHub CLI 等项目。它提供简单接口，支持子命令、POSIX 兼容标志、智能建议、自动帮助生成和 shell 自动补全，简化 CLI 开发流程。
summary.en: Cobra is a Go library for building powerful modern CLI applications, widely used in projects like Kubernetes, Hugo, and GitHub CLI. It offers a simple interface with features such as subcommands, POSIX-compliant flags, intelligent suggestions, automatic help generation, and shell autocompletion, streamlining CLI development.

metadata.name: fiber
metadata.description: ⚡️ Express inspired web framework written in Go

summary.zh: Fiber 是一个受 Express 启发的 Go 语言 Web 框架，基于高性能的 Fasthttp HTTP 引擎构建，专注于快速开发和零内存分配。它提供简洁的 API 和高效的路由处理，适用于构建高性能的 Web 服务器和微服务，特别适合需要低延迟和高吞吐量的应用场景。
summary.en: Fiber is an Express-inspired web framework written in Go, built on top of the high-performance Fasthttp HTTP engine, focusing on rapid development and zero memory allocation. It offers a clean API and efficient routing, ideal for building high-performance web servers and microservices, particularly suited for low-latency and high-throughput applications.

metadata.name: WatchYourLAN
metadata.description: Lightweight network IP scanner written in Go. With notifications, history, export to Grafana

summary.zh: WatchYourLAN 是一款基于 Go 语言开发的轻量级网络 IP 扫描器，提供 Web 图形界面，支持新主机发现通知、在线/离线历史监控，并能将数据导出至 InfluxDB2 或 Prometheus，用于构建 Grafana 仪表板，适用于网络监控和运维场景。
summary.en: WatchYourLAN is a lightweight network IP scanner written in Go, featuring a web GUI. It sends notifications for new host discoveries, monitors online/offline history, and exports data to InfluxDB2 or Prometheus for Grafana dashboards, ideal for network monitoring and operations.

metadata.name: project-layout
metadata.description: Standard Go Project Layout

summary.zh: 该仓库定义了Go语言项目的标准目录结构，汇集了Go生态系统中常见的历史和新兴项目布局模式。它提供了适用于大型实际应用的基本布局建议，包括cmd、internal等关键目录，旨在帮助团队在项目增长时保持代码结构清晰，避免依赖混乱。虽然非官方标准，但已成为社区广泛参考的实践指南。
summary.en: This repository defines a standard directory layout for Go projects, compiling common historical and emerging patterns in the Go ecosystem. It offers a basic structure suitable for large-scale real-world applications, including key directories like cmd and internal, to help teams maintain clean code organization as projects scale and avoid dependency issues. While not an official standard, it serves as a widely referenced community guide.

metadata.name: k8s_PaaS
metadata.description: 如何基于K8s(Kubernetes)部署成PaaS/DevOps(一套完整的软件研发和部署平台)--教程/学习(实战代码/架构设计/大量注释/操作配图)，你将习得部署如：K8S(Kubernetes)、Dashboard、Harbor、Jenkins、本地Gitlab、Apollo框架、Promtheus、Grafana、Spinnaker等。

summary.zh: 这是一个基于Kubernetes构建完整PaaS/DevOps平台的实战教程，涵盖K8S、Harbor、Jenkins、GitLab、Apollo、Prometheus、Grafana和Spinnaker等核心组件的部署。通过详细注释、配图和操作指南，帮助用户从零搭建自动化软件研发与部署环境，支持公有云部署，适合初学者和进阶者学习。
summary.en: This is a hands-on tutorial for building a complete PaaS/DevOps platform based on Kubernetes, covering core components like K8S, Harbor, Jenkins, GitLab, Apollo, Prometheus, Grafana, and Spinnaker. With detailed annotations, diagrams, and step-by-step instructions, it guides users in setting up an automated software development and deployment environment, supporting public cloud deployment for beginners and advanced learners.

metadata.name: reactive-resume
metadata.description: A one-of-a-kind resume builder that keeps your privacy in mind. Completely secure, customizable, portable, open-source and free forever. Try it out today!

summary.zh: Reactive Resume 是一款注重隐私的开源简历构建工具，提供实时预览、拖拽排序和多种导出格式。支持自定义模板、AI集成与多语言，可本地部署确保数据安全，适用于个人求职与职业发展。
summary.en: Reactive Resume is a privacy-focused open-source resume builder offering real-time preview, drag-and-drop ordering, and multiple export formats. It features customizable templates, AI integration, multi-language support, and self-hosting for data security, ideal for personal job applications and career development.

metadata.name: django-rq
metadata.description: A simple app that provides django integration for RQ (Redis Queue)

summary.zh: Django-RQ 是一个为 Django 框架提供 Redis Queue (RQ) 集成的简单应用，支持在 settings.py 中配置队列，并自动集成 Django 管理界面，用于后台任务处理和监控。适用于需要异步任务处理的 Web 应用，如邮件发送、数据处理等场景。
summary.en: Django-RQ is a simple app that integrates Redis Queue (RQ) with Django, allowing queue configuration in settings.py and automatic integration with Django's admin interface for background job processing and monitoring. It is suitable for web applications requiring asynchronous task handling, such as email sending and data processing.

metadata.name: sonic
metadata.description: A blazingly fast JSON serializing & deserializing library

summary.zh: Sonic 是字节跳动开源的高性能 JSON 序列化与反序列化库，通过 JIT 即时编译和 SIMD 指令集加速，实现极速处理。支持运行时对象绑定，无需代码生成，适用于大规模数据处理和高并发场景，在各类 JSON 大小和使用场景中性能领先。
summary.en: Sonic is a high-performance JSON serialization and deserialization library by ByteDance, accelerated by JIT and SIMD for blazing-fast processing. It supports runtime object binding without code generation, ideal for large-scale data handling and high-concurrency scenarios, outperforming in all JSON sizes and usage cases.

metadata.name: kubernetes
metadata.description: Production-Grade Container Scheduling and Management

summary.zh: Kubernetes（K8s）是一个开源的生产级容器编排和管理系统，用于跨多主机自动化部署、扩展和运维容器化应用。它基于Google Borg系统的多年经验，结合社区最佳实践，提供高可用、可扩展的微服务架构支持，广泛应用于云原生和混合云环境。
summary.en: Kubernetes (K8s) is an open-source, production-grade container orchestration and management system for automating deployment, scaling, and operations of containerized applications across multiple hosts. Built on Google's Borg experience and community best practices, it offers high availability, scalability, and support for microservices architectures, widely used in cloud-native and hybrid cloud environments.

metadata.name: uv
metadata.description: An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.

summary.zh: uv 是一个用 Rust 编写的极速 Python 包和项目管理器，旨在替代 pip、poetry 等传统工具，提供 10-100 倍的速度提升。它支持项目依赖管理、虚拟环境、脚本运行、Python 版本控制及工具安装，具备通用锁文件、工作空间和全局缓存等特性，适用于高效 Python 开发与部署。
summary.en: uv is an extremely fast Python package and project manager written in Rust, designed to replace traditional tools like pip and poetry with 10-100x speed improvements. It supports dependency management, virtual environments, script execution, Python version control, and tool installation, featuring a universal lockfile, workspaces, and global cache for efficient Python development and deployment.

metadata.name: advanced-go-programming-book
metadata.description: :books: 《Go语言高级编程》开源图书，涵盖CGO、Go汇编语言、RPC实现、Protobuf插件实现、Web框架实现、分布式系统等高阶主题(完稿)

summary.zh: 《Go语言高级编程》是一本开源技术书籍，专注于Go语言的高级主题，涵盖CGO、Go汇编语言、RPC实现、Web框架和分布式系统等核心内容。本书面向有一定Go经验的开发者，提供深入的系统编程和底层实现知识，帮助读者掌握Go在复杂应用中的高级用法。
summary.en: 《Advanced Go Programming》 is an open-source technical book focusing on advanced Go topics, including CGO, Go assembly language, RPC implementation, web frameworks, and distributed systems. It targets developers with prior Go experience, offering in-depth knowledge of system programming and low-level implementations to master Go's advanced applications in complex scenarios.

metadata.name: zadig
metadata.description: Zadig: An AI-powered, cloud-native, distributed DevOps platform designed for developers

summary.zh: Zadig 是一款基于 Kubernetes 的云原生 DevOps 平台，集成了 AI 智能能力，如环境检查和性能诊断，支持高并发工作流、多环境管理和企业级集成。它旨在通过自动化流程和智能优化，加速微服务架构下的研发交付，助力企业实现数字化转型。
summary.en: Zadig is a Kubernetes-based, cloud-native DevOps platform that integrates AI capabilities such as environment inspection and performance diagnosis. It supports high-concurrency workflows, multi-environment management, and enterprise-level integrations, aiming to accelerate R&D delivery in microservices architectures and drive digital transformation.

metadata.name: nginx-ui
metadata.description: Yet another WebUI for Nginx

summary.zh: Nginx UI 是一个基于 Web 的 Nginx 配置管理工具，提供可视化界面简化服务器配置、SSL 证书管理和站点部署。适用于运维人员和开发者，支持 Docker 部署，提升 Nginx 管理效率与便捷性。
summary.en: Nginx UI is a web-based configuration management tool for Nginx, offering a visual interface to simplify server setup, SSL certificate management, and site deployment. It targets DevOps and developers, supports Docker deployment, and enhances Nginx administration efficiency and convenience.

metadata.name: optimizer
metadata.description: The finest Windows Optimizer

summary.zh: Optimizer是一款高级Windows隐私与安全配置工具，专为提升系统性能和隐私保护设计。它支持多语言，提供禁用Windows服务、关闭遥测、阻止自动更新、清理系统、管理启动项等丰富功能，适用于新系统安装后的优化和日常维护。
summary.en: Optimizer is an advanced Windows privacy and security configuration utility designed to enhance system performance and privacy. It offers multilingual support, features like disabling Windows services, turning off telemetry, blocking automatic updates, cleaning the system, and managing startup programs, ideal for post-installation optimization and routine maintenance.

metadata.name: OFGB
metadata.description: GUI Tool To Remove Ads From Various Places Around Windows 11

summary.zh: OFGB是一款针对Windows 11的图形界面工具，旨在移除操作系统中的广告，如文件资源管理器、开始菜单等。它通过修改Windows注册表键值来禁用广告，采用C#和WPF开发，提供用户友好的界面，适用于希望提升系统纯净度的用户。
summary.en: OFGB is a GUI tool for Windows 11 designed to remove ads from the operating system, including in File Explorer and Start Menu. It modifies Windows Registry keys to disable ads, built with C# and WPF, offering a user-friendly interface for users seeking a cleaner system experience.

metadata.name: drawdb
metadata.description: Free, simple, and intuitive online database diagram editor and SQL generator.

summary.zh: DrawDB 是一款免费、简单直观的在线数据库图表编辑器和 SQL 生成工具，支持在浏览器中快速构建数据库实体关系图，通过点击操作生成 SQL 脚本，无需账户即可使用，适用于数据库设计、开发和文档编写场景。
summary.en: DrawDB is a free, simple, and intuitive online database diagram editor and SQL generator that enables users to quickly build database entity relationship diagrams in the browser, generate SQL scripts with clicks, and use without an account, ideal for database design, development, and documentation.

metadata.name: rq
metadata.description: Simple job queues for Python

summary.zh: RQ（Redis Queue）是一个基于Redis或Valkey的轻量级Python任务队列库，专为后台作业处理设计。它提供简单易用的API，支持任务优先级、定时调度、重复执行和失败重试，适用于从简单应用到高并发企业系统的各种规模项目，具有低入门门槛和高可扩展性。
summary.en: RQ (Redis Queue) is a lightweight Python task queue library backed by Redis or Valkey, designed for background job processing. It offers an easy-to-use API with features like job prioritization, scheduling, repeating, and retry mechanisms, suitable for projects of any size from simple applications to high-volume enterprise systems, with low entry barriers and excellent scalability.

metadata.name: NotepadNext
metadata.description: A cross-platform, reimplementation of Notepad++

summary.zh: NotepadNext 是一个跨平台的文本编辑器，重新实现了 Notepad++ 的核心功能。它支持 Windows、Linux 和 macOS，提供安装包和 AppImage 等多种安装方式。项目基于 Qt 6.5 和 C++ 开发，强调稳定性和可用性，但仍在积极开发中，欢迎贡献。
summary.en: NotepadNext is a cross-platform text editor that reimplements the core features of Notepad++. It supports Windows, Linux, and macOS, offering various installation methods such as packages and AppImage. The project is built with Qt 6.5 and C++, focusing on stability and usability while actively seeking contributions for ongoing development.

metadata.name: controller-runtime
metadata.description: Repo for the controller-runtime subproject of kubebuilder (sig-apimachinery)

summary.zh: Kubernetes controller-runtime 是一个用于构建控制器的 Go 库集合，为 Kubebuilder 和 Operator SDK 提供核心支持，简化 Kubernetes 控制器开发。它提供管理器、控制器构建器和版本兼容性管理，适用于云原生应用和自动化运维场景。
summary.en: Kubernetes controller-runtime is a set of Go libraries for building controllers, providing core support for Kubebuilder and Operator SDK to simplify Kubernetes controller development. It offers manager, controller builder, and version compatibility management, suitable for cloud-native applications and automation operations.

metadata.name: client-go
metadata.description: Go client for Kubernetes.

summary.zh: client-go 是 Kubernetes 官方维护的 Go 语言客户端库，用于与 Kubernetes 集群进行交互。它提供完整的 API 客户端、动态客户端、发现机制和认证插件，支持自动化运维和云原生应用开发。核心亮点包括严格的版本兼容性管理、丰富的工具包（如缓存控制器）以及作为 Kubernetes 核心项目的一部分，确保稳定性和持续更新。
summary.en: client-go is the official Go client library for Kubernetes, enabling interaction with Kubernetes clusters. It offers a full-featured API client, dynamic client, discovery mechanisms, and authentication plugins, supporting automation and cloud-native application development. Key highlights include rigorous version compatibility management, extensive tooling (e.g., cache controllers), and integration as part of the core Kubernetes project for stability and ongoing updates.

metadata.name: kind
metadata.description: Kubernetes IN Docker - local clusters for testing Kubernetes

summary.zh: Kind 是一个使用 Docker 容器作为节点运行本地 Kubernetes 集群的工具，专为测试 Kubernetes 本身设计，也可用于本地开发或持续集成。它基于 Go 语言实现，通过 kubeadm 引导集群，提供命令行界面和 Docker 镜像，支持快速创建和销毁集群，简化了 Kubernetes 的本地测试环境搭建。
summary.en: Kind is a tool for running local Kubernetes clusters using Docker container nodes, primarily designed for testing Kubernetes itself, with applications in local development or CI. Built with Go and leveraging kubeadm for cluster bootstrapping, it offers a CLI and Docker images to quickly create and destroy clusters, streamlining local Kubernetes testing environments.

metadata.name: rustdesk
metadata.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

summary.zh: RustDesk 是一款开源远程桌面应用，支持自托管，可作为 TeamViewer 的替代方案。它基于 Rust 开发，提供开箱即用的体验，无需配置，用户可完全控制数据，确保安全。支持使用官方或自定义中继服务器，适用于个人和企业远程访问场景。
summary.en: RustDesk is an open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, serving as an alternative to TeamViewer. Built with Rust, it offers out-of-the-box functionality with no configuration required, giving users full control over their data for enhanced security. It supports using official or custom relay servers, suitable for personal and enterprise remote access.

metadata.name: terminal
metadata.description: The new Windows Terminal and the original Windows console host, all in the same place!

summary.zh: Windows Terminal 是微软推出的现代化终端应用，集成了 Windows 控制台主机，提供高性能、可定制和跨平台兼容的终端体验。它支持多标签、GPU 加速渲染、主题配置和丰富的命令行工具，适用于开发、运维和系统管理场景。
summary.en: Windows Terminal is a modern terminal application by Microsoft, integrating the Windows console host to deliver a high-performance, customizable, and cross-platform compatible terminal experience. It features multi-tab support, GPU-accelerated rendering, theme configuration, and extensive command-line tools, ideal for development, operations, and system management.

metadata.name: BewlyBewly
metadata.description: Just make a few small changes to your Bilibili homepage. (English | 简体中文 | 正體中文 | 廣東話)

summary.zh: BewlyBewly 是一款针对 Bilibili 网站的浏览器扩展，专注于界面优化和视觉美化，通过重新设计 UI 提升用户体验。其设计灵感源自 YouTube、Vision OS 和 iOS，提供更现代、美观的界面，支持暗色模式适配常用页面。项目基于 vitesse-webext 模板开发，适用于 Chrome、Edge 和 Firefox 浏览器。
summary.en: BewlyBewly is a browser extension for Bilibili that focuses on UI redesign and visual enhancement to improve user experience. Inspired by YouTube, Vision OS, and iOS, it offers a more modern and aesthetically pleasing interface, with dark mode support for commonly used pages. The project is built using the vitesse-webext template and is compatible with Chrome, Edge, and Firefox browsers.

metadata.name: cachetools
metadata.description: Extensible memoizing collections and decorators

summary.zh: cachetools 是一个 Python 缓存库，提供可扩展的缓存集合和装饰器，用于优化函数调用性能。它支持多种缓存算法（如 LRU、TTL），适用于动态编程、API 调用和数据处理等场景，提升应用效率。
summary.en: cachetools is a Python caching library offering extensible memoizing collections and decorators to optimize function call performance. It supports various cache algorithms (e.g., LRU, TTL) and is suitable for scenarios like dynamic programming, API calls, and data processing to enhance application efficiency.

metadata.name: jellyfin
metadata.description: The Free Software Media System - Server Backend & API

summary.zh: Jellyfin 是一个免费开源的媒体管理系统，提供服务器后端和 API，支持跨平台部署。它允许用户自主管理和流式传输媒体内容，是 Emby 和 Plex 的替代方案，基于 .NET 平台构建，确保全平台兼容性。核心价值在于无许可费用、无隐藏功能，专注于社区驱动的媒体服务解决方案。
summary.en: Jellyfin is a free and open-source media system offering server backend and API, supporting cross-platform deployment. It enables users to manage and stream media content independently, serving as an alternative to Emby and Plex, built on the .NET platform for full cross-platform compatibility. Its core value lies in no licensing fees, no hidden features, focusing on community-driven media service solutions.

metadata.name: Shell
metadata.description: Powerful context menu manager for Windows File Explorer

summary.zh: Shell 是一款强大的 Windows 文件资源管理器上下文菜单管理器，允许用户自定义菜单项，集成网页、文件、文件夹和应用程序快捷方式，并支持修改或删除系统及第三方软件添加的菜单项。它轻量便携，提供丰富的自定义选项，如表达式语法、图标支持和多列菜单，适用于提升 Windows 文件管理效率。
summary.en: Shell is a powerful context menu manager for Windows File Explorer, enabling users to customize menu items, integrate shortcuts to web pages, files, folders, and applications, and modify or remove items added by the system or third-party software. It is lightweight, portable, and offers extensive customization features such as expression syntax, icon support, and multi-column menus, ideal for enhancing Windows file management productivity.

metadata.name: kubebuilder
metadata.description: Kubebuilder - SDK for building Kubernetes APIs using CRDs

summary.zh: Kubebuilder 是一个用于构建 Kubernetes API 的框架，基于自定义资源定义（CRD），旨在简化 Go 语言中 API 的开发与发布。它提供插件架构和库支持，减少样板代码，提升开发效率，适用于云原生应用和运维自动化场景。
summary.en: Kubebuilder is a framework for building Kubernetes APIs using Custom Resource Definitions (CRDs), designed to simplify development and publishing in Go. It offers a plugin architecture and library support to reduce boilerplate and enhance productivity, ideal for cloud-native applications and operational automation.

metadata.name: TrafficMonitor
metadata.description: 这是一个用于显示当前网速、CPU及内存利用率的桌面悬浮窗软件，并支持任务栏显示，支持更换皮肤。

summary.zh: TrafficMonitor 是一款专为 Windows 平台设计的桌面悬浮窗软件，实时监控网速、CPU 及内存利用率，支持任务栏嵌入和皮肤更换。核心价值在于提供轻量级系统资源监控，适用于日常运维和性能优化场景，具备插件系统和历史流量统计功能，提升用户体验。
summary.en: TrafficMonitor is a desktop floating window software designed for Windows, providing real-time monitoring of network speed, CPU, and memory usage, with support for taskbar embedding and skin customization. Its core value lies in lightweight system resource monitoring, suitable for daily operations and performance optimization, featuring a plugin system and historical traffic statistics to enhance user experience.

metadata.name: virtual-dsm
metadata.description: Virtual DSM in a Docker container.

summary.zh: Virtual DSM 是一个在 Docker 容器中运行的虚拟化 Synology DiskStation Manager (DSM) 系统，提供完整的 NAS 功能。它支持 KVM 加速、多磁盘配置和在线升级，适用于个人或开发者在容器化环境中快速部署和管理私有云存储服务。
summary.en: Virtual DSM is a virtualized Synology DiskStation Manager (DSM) system running in a Docker container, offering full NAS functionality. It supports KVM acceleration, multiple disk configurations, and online upgrades, suitable for individuals or developers to quickly deploy and manage private cloud storage services in containerized environments.

metadata.name: archbase
metadata.description: 教科书《计算机体系结构基础》（胡伟武等，第三版）的开源版本

summary.zh: 这是《计算机体系结构基础》（第三版）的开源版本，由龙芯团队胡伟武等人编写。核心价值在于提供一本活的教科书，通过开源和版本管理（使用RMarkdown和Bookdown工具）实现内容的持续更新和勘误，支持HTML、PDF、DOCX多格式输出。应用场景包括高校计算机体系结构课程教学、技术参考和自学，技术亮点包括基于龙芯架构的实例、Docker环境复现和自动化部署流程。
summary.en: This is the open-source version of 'Fundamentals of Computer Architecture' (3rd Edition), authored by Hu Weiwu and the Loongson team. It offers a living textbook through open-source and version management using RMarkdown and Bookdown, enabling continuous updates and errata with multi-format outputs (HTML, PDF, DOCX). It serves as a resource for university courses in computer architecture, technical reference, and self-study, featuring Loongson architecture examples, Docker environment replication, and automated deployment workflows.

metadata.name: LxgwWenKai
metadata.description: An unprofessional open-source Chinese font derived from Fontworks' Klee One. 一款非专业的开源中文字体，基于 FONTWORKS 出品字体 Klee One 衍生。

summary.zh: 霞鹜文楷是一款基于Fontworks Klee One衍生的开源中文字体，提供多种变体如屏幕阅读版、轻便版和GB/TC版本，适用于屏幕显示、软件嵌入和繁体中文场景。项目强调开源合规性，警告商业滥用，并支持社区反馈，技术亮点包括字形优化和跨平台适配。
summary.en: LXGW WenKai is an open-source Chinese font derived from Fontworks' Klee One, offering variants like Screen, Lite, and GB/TC editions for screen readability, software embedding, and traditional Chinese usage. The project emphasizes open-source compliance, warns against commercial misuse, and supports community feedback, with technical highlights in glyph optimization and cross-platform compatibility.

metadata.name: go-ansible
metadata.description: Go-ansible is a Go package that enables the execution of ansible-playbook or ansible commands directly from Golang applications. It supports a wide range of options for each command, enabling smooth integration of Ansible functionality into your projects.

summary.zh: Go-ansible 是一个 Go 库，用于从 Go 应用程序中直接执行 Ansible 命令（如 ansible-playbook、ansible-inventory、ansible-galaxy 和 ansible）。它作为 Ansible CLI 的包装器，支持广泛的命令选项，实现 Ansible 自动化功能与 Go 项目的无缝集成，适用于运维自动化、配置管理和复杂工作流编排等场景。
summary.en: Go-ansible is a Go library that enables direct execution of Ansible commands (such as ansible-playbook, ansible-inventory, ansible-galaxy, and ansible) from Go applications. It acts as a wrapper around the Ansible CLI, supporting a wide range of command options for seamless integration of Ansible automation into Go projects, ideal for operations automation, configuration management, and complex workflow orchestration.

metadata.name: tiny-rdm
metadata.description: Tiny RDM (Tiny Redis Desktop Manager) - A modern, colorful, super lightweight Redis GUI client for Mac, Windows, and Linux. It also provides a web version that can be deployed via Docker.

summary.zh: Tiny RDM 是一款现代、多彩、超轻量级的 Redis 桌面管理器，支持 Mac、Windows 和 Linux 平台，并提供可通过 Docker 部署的 Web 版本。它具备直观的用户界面、多语言支持、高级连接管理（如 SSH 隧道和集群模式）、可视化键值操作、分段加载大数据集以及实时命令监控等功能，适用于 Redis 数据库的日常管理和开发调试。
summary.en: Tiny RDM is a modern, colorful, and super lightweight Redis desktop manager for Mac, Windows, and Linux, with a web version deployable via Docker. It features an intuitive UI, multi-language support, advanced connection management (e.g., SSH tunnel and cluster mode), visual key-value operations, segmented loading for large datasets, and real-time command monitoring, ideal for daily Redis database management and development debugging.

metadata.name: headscale
metadata.description: An open source, self-hosted implementation of the Tailscale control server

summary.zh: Headscale 是一个开源自托管的 Tailscale 控制服务器实现，专为个人用户和小型组织设计。它基于 WireGuard 技术，提供安全的 VPN 网络管理，支持节点间密钥交换、IP 地址分配和路由共享，实现私有网络的自动化部署与维护。
summary.en: Headscale is an open-source, self-hosted implementation of the Tailscale control server, designed for personal users and small organizations. Built on WireGuard, it enables secure VPN network management, facilitating key exchange, IP address assignment, and route sharing for automated private network deployment and maintenance.

metadata.name: windows
metadata.description: Windows inside a Docker container.

summary.zh: dockur/windows 是一个将 Windows 操作系统运行在 Docker 容器中的项目，支持从 Windows 2000 到 Windows 11 及服务器版本。它提供 ISO 下载器、KVM 加速和基于 Web 的查看器，实现全自动安装，可通过 Docker Compose、Docker CLI、Kubernetes 或图形化安装器快速部署，适用于测试、开发或隔离环境。
summary.en: dockur/windows is a project that runs Windows operating systems inside Docker containers, supporting versions from Windows 2000 to Windows 11 and server editions. It features an ISO downloader, KVM acceleration, and a web-based viewer for fully automated installation, deployable via Docker Compose, Docker CLI, Kubernetes, or a graphical installer, ideal for testing, development, or isolated environments.

metadata.name: django-prometheus
metadata.description: Export Django monitoring metrics for Prometheus.io

summary.zh: django-prometheus 是一个用于 Django 框架的监控库，可将 Django 应用的请求、数据库访问和缓存操作等关键指标导出为 Prometheus 格式，便于实时性能监控和运维分析。它支持自定义指标命名空间和延迟桶配置，适用于生产环境中的 Web 应用监控场景。
summary.en: django-prometheus is a monitoring library for Django that exports key metrics such as requests, database access, and cache operations in Prometheus format, enabling real-time performance monitoring and operational analysis. It supports custom metric namespaces and latency bucket configurations, ideal for monitoring web applications in production environments.

metadata.name: excalidraw
metadata.description: Virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn like diagrams

summary.zh: Excalidraw 是一款开源虚拟白板，支持手绘风格图表绘制，具备实时协作和端到端加密功能。它提供无限画布、多种工具、暗黑模式及导出选项，适用于草图设计、线框图和团队协作等场景。
summary.en: Excalidraw is an open-source virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn style diagrams, featuring real-time collaboration and end-to-end encryption. It offers an infinite canvas, diverse tools, dark mode, and export options, ideal for wireframing, brainstorming, and team collaboration.

metadata.name: smartdns
metadata.description: A local DNS server to obtain the fastest website IP for the best Internet experience, support DoT, DoH, DoQ. 一个本地DNS服务器，获取最快的网站IP，获得最佳上网体验，支持DoH，DoT，DoQ。

summary.zh: SmartDNS 是一个本地 DNS 服务器，通过从多个上游 DNS 服务器获取查询结果，并返回访问速度最快的 IP 地址，以提升网络访问速度。支持 DoT、DoH、DoQ 等加密协议保护隐私，具备广告过滤、域名分流等功能，适用于路由器、树莓派、Windows 等多平台部署。
summary.en: SmartDNS is a local DNS server that retrieves query results from multiple upstream DNS servers and returns the fastest IP address to enhance internet speed. It supports encrypted protocols like DoT, DoH, and DoQ for privacy protection, with features such as ad filtering and domain splitting, suitable for deployment on routers, Raspberry Pi, Windows, and other platforms.

metadata.name: casbin
metadata.description: Apache Casbin: an authorization library that supports access control models like ACL, RBAC, ABAC.

summary.zh: Apache Casbin 是一个强大高效的授权库，支持 ACL、RBAC、ABAC 等多种访问控制模型，适用于 Golang 及其他多语言项目，提供生产就绪的权限管理解决方案。
summary.en: Apache Casbin is a powerful and efficient authorization library that supports access control models like ACL, RBAC, and ABAC, suitable for Golang and multi-language projects, offering production-ready permission management solutions.

metadata.name: django-db-connection-pool
metadata.description: Database connection pool component library for Django

summary.zh: django-db-connection-pool 是一个基于 SQLAlchemy 的 Django 数据库连接池组件库，支持 MySQL、Oracle、PostgreSQL 和 JDBC 驱动。它通过替换 Django 默认数据库后端，提供可配置的连接池管理，有效提升多进程和多线程环境下的数据库连接性能与资源利用率。
summary.en: django-db-connection-pool is a Django database connection pool component library based on SQLAlchemy, supporting MySQL, Oracle, PostgreSQL, and JDBC drivers. It replaces Django's default database backends with configurable connection pools, enhancing performance and resource efficiency in multiprocessing and multithreading environments.

metadata.name: hugo-eureka
metadata.description: Eureka is a feature-rich and highly customizable Hugo theme.

summary.zh: Eureka 是一个功能丰富且高度可定制的 Hugo 主题，专为快速构建和部署静态网站设计。它提供优雅的界面、多语言支持和灵活的配置选项，适用于个人博客、文档站点和项目展示等场景，帮助用户轻松创建专业级网站。
summary.en: Eureka is a feature-rich and highly customizable Hugo theme designed for quickly building and deploying static websites. It offers an elegant interface, multilingual support, and flexible configuration options, suitable for personal blogs, documentation sites, and project showcases, enabling users to create professional websites with ease.

metadata.name: netshoot
metadata.description: a Docker + Kubernetes network trouble-shooting swiss-army container

summary.zh: netshoot 是一个专为 Docker 和 Kubernetes 网络故障排查设计的瑞士军刀式容器。它集成了丰富的网络诊断工具，允许用户通过切换网络命名空间，在不修改主机或应用容器的情况下，高效诊断容器、Pod 或主机层面的网络问题。支持 Docker、Docker Compose 和 Kubernetes 环境，适用于运维调试和网络性能分析场景。
summary.en: netshoot is a Swiss-army container designed for Docker and Kubernetes network troubleshooting. It integrates a comprehensive set of network diagnostic tools, enabling users to efficiently diagnose network issues at the container, pod, or host level by switching network namespaces without modifying the host or application containers. It supports Docker, Docker Compose, and Kubernetes environments, ideal for operational debugging and network performance analysis.

metadata.name: document-style-guide
metadata.description: 中文技术文档的写作规范

summary.zh: 该仓库提供中文技术文档的写作规范，涵盖标题、文本、段落、数值、标点符号和文档体系等核心要素，旨在提升技术文档的清晰度、一致性和专业性，适用于开发者、技术写作者和开源项目维护者。
summary.en: This repository offers a style guide for writing Chinese technical documentation, covering key elements such as titles, text, paragraphs, numbers, punctuation, and document structure, designed to enhance clarity, consistency, and professionalism for developers, technical writers, and open-source maintainers.

metadata.name: Atlas
metadata.description: 🚀 An open and lightweight modification to Windows, designed to optimize performance, privacy and usability.

summary.zh: AtlasOS 是一个开源的 Windows 系统轻量级修改项目，专注于优化性能、增强隐私和提升易用性。它通过移除遥测、调整组策略和应用脚本化配置，在保持系统稳定性和兼容性的同时，显著提升响应速度和安全性，适用于追求高效、私密桌面环境的用户。
summary.en: AtlasOS is an open-source, lightweight modification of Windows designed to optimize performance, enhance privacy, and improve usability. It removes telemetry, applies group policies, and uses script-based configurations to boost responsiveness and security while maintaining stability and compatibility, ideal for users seeking efficient and private desktop environments.

metadata.name: dockge
metadata.description: A fancy, easy-to-use and reactive self-hosted docker compose.yaml stack-oriented manager

summary.zh: Dockge 是一款美观易用、响应式的自托管 Docker Compose 栈管理器，专注于通过 Web 界面管理 compose.yaml 文件。它支持创建、编辑、启动、停止、重启和删除栈，提供交互式编辑器和 Web 终端，可将 docker run 命令转换为 compose.yaml，并支持多代理管理不同 Docker 主机。文件基于本地存储，保持与标准 docker compose 命令的兼容性，适用于个人或团队的自托管容器编排场景。
summary.en: Dockge is a fancy, easy-to-use, and reactive self-hosted manager for Docker Compose stacks, focusing on managing compose.yaml files via a web interface. It supports creating, editing, starting, stopping, restarting, and deleting stacks, offers an interactive editor and web terminal, converts docker run commands to compose.yaml, and enables multi-agent management across different Docker hosts. With file-based storage that maintains compatibility with standard docker compose commands, it is ideal for self-hosted container orchestration in personal or team environments.

metadata.name: uptime-kuma
metadata.description: A fancy self-hosted monitoring tool

summary.zh: Uptime Kuma 是一款功能丰富的自托管监控工具，支持 HTTP(s)、TCP、Ping、DNS 等多种协议监控，提供 20 秒间隔的实时检测和 90+ 通知服务集成。其响应式 UI 和多语言界面便于部署，适用于个人或企业服务器状态监控与运维自动化。
summary.en: Uptime Kuma is a feature-rich self-hosted monitoring tool that supports monitoring for HTTP(s), TCP, Ping, DNS, and more, with 20-second interval checks and integration with 90+ notification services. Its reactive UI and multi-language interface facilitate easy deployment, ideal for personal or enterprise server status monitoring and operational automation.

metadata.name: asynq
metadata.description: Simple, reliable, and efficient distributed task queue in Go

summary.zh: Asynq 是一个基于 Go 语言和 Redis 的分布式任务队列库，专注于简单、可靠和高效的任务处理。它支持任务调度、重试、优先级队列和自动恢复，适用于构建高可用、可扩展的后台作业系统，如异步处理、定时任务和负载分发。
summary.en: Asynq is a Go-based distributed task queue library backed by Redis, designed for simplicity, reliability, and efficiency. It supports task scheduling, retries, priority queues, and automatic recovery, ideal for building scalable and high-availability background job systems such as asynchronous processing, scheduled tasks, and workload distribution.

metadata.name: memos
metadata.description: Open-source, self-hosted note-taking tool built for quick capture. Markdown-native, lightweight, and fully yours.

summary.zh: Memos 是一款开源、自托管的笔记工具，专为快速记录设计。它原生支持 Markdown，轻量级且完全由用户掌控数据所有权。核心亮点包括时间线优先的即时捕获界面、极简部署（单 Go 二进制或约 20MB Docker 镜像）以及支持 SQLite、MySQL 和 PostgreSQL 数据库。适用于个人或团队快速笔记、知识管理及私有化部署场景。
summary.en: Memos is an open-source, self-hosted note-taking tool designed for quick capture. It is Markdown-native, lightweight, and ensures full data ownership. Key features include a timeline-first UI for instant note-taking, minimal deployment (single Go binary or ~20MB Docker image), and support for SQLite, MySQL, and PostgreSQL databases. Ideal for personal or team note-taking, knowledge management, and private hosting scenarios.

metadata.name: deploy
metadata.description: Ansible role to deploy scripting applications like PHP, Python, Ruby, etc. in a capistrano style

summary.zh: Ansistrano 是一个基于 Ansible 的部署角色，用于以 Capistrano 风格自动化部署 PHP、Python、Ruby 等脚本应用。它提供零停机部署、回滚、钩子任务和旧版本清理功能，简化多服务器环境下的应用发布流程，提升运维效率。
summary.en: Ansistrano is an Ansible role for automating deployments of scripting applications like PHP, Python, and Ruby in a Capistrano style. It features zero-downtime deployments, rollback capabilities, custom hooks, and pruning of old releases, streamlining application release processes in multi-server environments to enhance operational efficiency.

metadata.name: Scoop
metadata.description: A command-line installer for Windows.

summary.zh: Scoop 是 Windows 平台的命令行包管理器，专注于简化软件安装流程。它通过消除 UAC 提示、隐藏 GUI 安装界面、避免 PATH 污染和自动处理依赖，实现高效、无干扰的应用部署。支持脚本化配置和 aria2 多连接下载，适用于开发环境搭建和自动化运维场景。
summary.en: Scoop is a command-line package manager for Windows, designed to streamline software installation. It eliminates UAC prompts, hides GUI installers, prevents PATH pollution, and automatically resolves dependencies for efficient, non-intrusive app deployment. It supports scriptable setups and aria2 multi-connection downloads, ideal for development environments and automation tasks.

metadata.name: notepad--
metadata.description: 一个支持windows/linux/mac的文本编辑器，目标是做中国人自己的编辑器，来自中国。

summary.zh: Notepad-- 是一款轻量级跨平台文本编辑器，支持 Windows、Linux 和 macOS，专注于国产软件替代，尤其在国产信创 UOS 系统上优化。其核心价值在于提供可替代竞品的开源工具，强调中立性和实用性，避免政治言论，旨在减少错误言论影响。应用场景包括日常文本编辑和国产系统适配，技术亮点包括跨平台兼容性和社区驱动开发。
summary.en: Notepad-- is a lightweight cross-platform text editor supporting Windows, Linux, and macOS, focusing on domestic software replacement, especially optimized for UOS systems. Its core value lies in providing an open-source alternative to competitors, emphasizing neutrality and practicality to avoid political discourse and reduce the impact of erroneous statements. Application scenarios include daily text editing and domestic system adaptation, with technical highlights such as cross-platform compatibility and community-driven development.

metadata.name: yay
metadata.description: Yet another Yogurt - An AUR Helper written in Go

summary.zh: yay 是一个用 Go 语言编写的 Arch Linux AUR 助手，专注于简化 AUR 包的管理。它提供高级依赖解析、PKGBUILD 下载、搜索优化和构建自动化等功能，适用于 Arch 用户高效安装和更新软件。
summary.en: yay is an AUR helper written in Go for Arch Linux, designed to streamline AUR package management. It features advanced dependency solving, PKGBUILD downloading, search optimization, and build automation, ideal for Arch users to efficiently install and update software.

metadata.name: traefik
metadata.description: The Cloud Native Application Proxy

summary.zh: Traefik 是一款现代化的云原生应用代理和负载均衡器，专为微服务架构设计。它能够自动发现并集成多种基础设施组件（如 Docker、Kubernetes），实现动态配置更新，无需重启即可支持 HTTPS、WebSocket 和多种负载均衡算法，简化了微服务部署和运维。
summary.en: Traefik is a modern cloud-native application proxy and load balancer designed for microservices. It automatically discovers and integrates with various infrastructure components (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes), enabling dynamic configuration updates without restarts, and supports HTTPS, WebSocket, and multiple load balancing algorithms to simplify microservice deployment and operations.

metadata.name: awesome-selfhosted
metadata.description: A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers

summary.zh: Awesome-Selfhosted 是一个精选的开源自托管软件列表，涵盖网络服务和Web应用，帮助用户在自有服务器上部署和管理各类工具，实现数据自主与隐私保护。核心价值在于提供全面的分类目录，覆盖分析、自动化、通信、文件管理等数十个领域，技术亮点包括严格的自由软件筛选和持续维护的社区驱动模式。
summary.en: Awesome-Selfhosted is a curated list of free software network services and web applications that can be hosted on personal servers, enabling users to deploy and manage diverse tools for data autonomy and privacy. It offers a comprehensive categorized directory spanning analytics, automation, communication, file management, and more, with key features including strict free software criteria and community-driven maintenance.

metadata.name: the-art-of-command-line
metadata.description: Master the command line, in one page

summary.zh: 《命令行艺术》是一个简洁而全面的命令行使用指南，旨在帮助用户掌握Linux命令行技能，提升工程效率和灵活性。它涵盖了从基础到高级的技巧，包括文件处理、系统调试和实用单行命令，适用于初学者和专家，并支持多语言版本。
summary.en: The Art of Command Line is a concise yet comprehensive guide to mastering Linux command-line skills, designed to enhance engineering efficiency and flexibility. It covers tips from basics to advanced topics, including file processing, system debugging, and useful one-liners, suitable for both beginners and experts, with multilingual support.

metadata.name: Microsoft-Activation-Scripts
metadata.description: Open-source Windows and Office activator featuring HWID, Ohook, TSforge, and Online KMS activation methods, along with advanced troubleshooting.

summary.zh: Microsoft Activation Scripts (MAS) 是一款开源工具，用于激活 Windows 和 Office 系统，支持 HWID、Ohook、TSforge 和在线 KMS 等多种方法，并提供高级故障排除功能。它通过 PowerShell 或传统脚本运行，适用于个人用户绕过激活限制，强调安全性和易用性。
summary.en: Microsoft Activation Scripts (MAS) is an open-source tool for activating Windows and Office systems, featuring HWID, Ohook, TSforge, and Online KMS methods, along with advanced troubleshooting. It runs via PowerShell or traditional scripts, designed for personal users to bypass activation restrictions, with a focus on security and ease of use.

metadata.name: python-validator
metadata.description: a data validator like Django ORM

summary.zh: python-validator 是一个类似 Django ORM 的数据校验库，专为 Python 应用设计，尤其适用于 Web 后端校验前端输入数据。它通过类定义数据结构，支持类型检查、默认值、范围限制等，提供自动生成模拟数据、清晰打印结构等特性，简化数据验证流程，提高开发效率。
summary.en: python-validator is a data validation library similar to Django ORM, designed for Python applications, particularly useful for validating frontend input in web backends. It defines data structures using classes, supports type checking, default values, range constraints, and offers features like automatic mock data generation and clear structure printing, streamlining validation processes and boosting development efficiency.

metadata.name: comcast
metadata.description: Simulating shitty network connections so you can build better systems.

summary.zh: Comcast 是一个网络模拟工具，用于在开发环境中模拟常见的网络问题，如延迟、带宽限制和数据包丢失/重排/损坏，帮助开发者测试分布式系统在非理想网络条件下的表现。它通过封装系统工具（如 Linux 的 iptables/tc 和 BSD/OSX 的 ipfw/pfctl）实现跨平台支持，提供命令行接口进行配置和停止模拟。
summary.en: Comcast is a network simulation tool designed to emulate common network issues like latency, bandwidth restrictions, and packet loss/reordering/corruption in development environments, aiding developers in testing distributed systems under non-ideal network conditions. It achieves cross-platform support by wrapping system tools (e.g., iptables/tc on Linux and ipfw/pfctl on BSD/OSX), offering a command-line interface for configuration and stopping simulations.

metadata.name: understand_linux_process
metadata.description: The open-source ebook of Understand Linux Process

summary.zh: 《理解Linux进程》是一本开源电子书，通过Go语言重写示例程序，系统讲解Linux进程的核心原理与概念。本书结合Docker提供可复现的实验环境，适合Linux程序员深入学习进程机制，提升系统编程能力。
summary.en: 《Understand Linux Process》 is an open-source ebook that explains the core principles and concepts of Linux processes using Go language examples. It provides reproducible experimental environments with Docker, making it ideal for Linux programmers to enhance their system programming skills.

metadata.name: gost
metadata.description: GO Simple Tunnel - a simple tunnel written in golang

summary.zh: GO Simple Tunnel (GOST) 是一个用 Go 语言编写的安全隧道工具，支持多协议、多级转发链和端口转发，适用于正向代理、反向代理和内网穿透等场景。其核心亮点包括负载均衡、路由控制、插件系统和 Prometheus 监控，提供 Web API 和 GUI 界面，便于网络运维和自动化管理。
summary.en: GO Simple Tunnel (GOST) is a secure tunneling tool written in Go, featuring multi-protocol support, multi-level forwarding chains, and port forwarding. It is suitable for forward proxy, reverse proxy, and intranet penetration scenarios. Key highlights include load balancing, routing control, plugin system, and Prometheus monitoring, with Web API and GUI interfaces for network operations and automation.

metadata.name: easeprobe
metadata.description: A simple, standalone, and lightweight tool that can do health/status checking, written in Go.

summary.zh: EaseProbe 是一个用 Go 语言编写的简单、独立、轻量级的健康状态检查工具，支持 HTTP、TCP、Ping、Shell、SSH、TLS、主机负载及多种数据库客户端（如 MySQL、Redis）的探测，并提供 Slack、Discord、Telegram、邮件等通知功能，适用于运维监控和系统健康管理。
summary.en: EaseProbe is a simple, standalone, and lightweight health/status checking tool written in Go. It supports probes for HTTP, TCP, Ping, Shell, SSH, TLS, host load, and various database clients (e.g., MySQL, Redis), with notifications via Slack, Discord, Telegram, email, etc., ideal for operations monitoring and system health management.

metadata.name: nps
metadata.description: 一款轻量级、高性能、功能强大的内网穿透代理服务器。支持tcp、udp、socks5、http等几乎所有流量转发，可用来访问内网网站、本地支付接口调试、ssh访问、远程桌面，内网dns解析、内网socks5代理等等……，并带有功能强大的web管理端。a lightweight, high-performance, powerful intranet penetration proxy server, with a powerful web management terminal.

summary.zh: NPS是一款轻量级、高性能的内网穿透代理服务器，支持TCP、UDP、HTTP、SOCKS5等多种协议转发，适用于访问内网网站、远程桌面、SSH调试等场景。它提供功能强大的Web管理端，支持全平台部署和简单配置，具备流量监控、多用户管理和扩展功能，如加密和带宽限制。
summary.en: NPS is a lightweight, high-performance intranet penetration proxy server that supports forwarding for protocols like TCP, UDP, HTTP, and SOCKS5. It is ideal for accessing internal networks, remote desktop, SSH debugging, and more. Featuring a powerful web management terminal, it offers cross-platform compatibility, easy configuration, traffic monitoring, multi-user support, and extensible functions such as encryption and bandwidth limiting.

metadata.name: devops-exercises
metadata.description: Linux, Jenkins, AWS, SRE, Prometheus, Docker, Python, Ansible, Git, Kubernetes, Terraform, OpenStack, SQL, NoSQL, Azure, GCP, DNS, Elastic, Network, Virtualization. DevOps Interview Questions

summary.zh: 该仓库是一个专注于DevOps和SRE领域的综合性学习资源库，包含2624个问题和练习，覆盖Linux、Jenkins、AWS、Docker、Kubernetes、Terraform等核心技术栈。核心价值在于为技术面试准备和技能提升提供结构化实践材料，强调实际应用而非理论覆盖，适合工程师自我学习和面试复习。
summary.en: This repository is a comprehensive learning resource focused on DevOps and SRE domains, featuring 2624 questions and exercises covering core technologies like Linux, Jenkins, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform. It provides structured practice materials for technical interview preparation and skill enhancement, emphasizing practical application over theoretical coverage, ideal for engineers' self-study and interview review.

metadata.name: go-leetcode
metadata.description: A collection of 100+ popular LeetCode problems solved in Go.

summary.zh: 该仓库包含100多个热门LeetCode问题的Go语言解决方案，涵盖数组、动态规划等核心算法类别。每个问题提供详细描述、已通过测试的代码和单元测试，旨在帮助开发者学习Go编程和算法技巧，提升面试准备效率。
summary.en: This repository offers Go solutions for over 100 popular LeetCode problems, covering key algorithm categories like arrays and dynamic programming. Each solution includes a description, tested code, and unit tests, designed to aid developers in learning Go programming and algorithmic techniques for interview preparation.

metadata.name: frp
metadata.description: A fast reverse proxy to help you expose a local server behind a NAT or firewall to the internet.

summary.zh: frp 是一个高性能的反向代理工具，专为穿透 NAT 或防火墙而设计，支持 TCP、UDP、HTTP 和 HTTPS 协议，可将本地服务器安全暴露到公网。它提供 P2P 连接模式、服务器仪表板和客户端管理界面，适用于远程访问、内网服务公开和跨网络通信等场景。
summary.en: frp is a high-performance reverse proxy tool designed to penetrate NAT or firewalls, supporting TCP, UDP, HTTP, and HTTPS protocols to securely expose local servers to the internet. It features P2P connection mode, server dashboard, and client admin UI, ideal for remote access, internal service exposure, and cross-network communication.

metadata.name: bubbletea
metadata.description: A powerful little TUI framework 🏗

summary.zh: Bubble Tea 是一个基于 Go 语言的终端用户界面（TUI）框架，采用 Elm 架构设计，提供功能式、状态化的开发方式。它适用于构建简单到复杂的终端应用，支持内联、全窗口或混合模式，具备高性能渲染、键盘鼠标处理、剪贴板支持等特性，适合开发命令行工具和交互式终端应用。
summary.en: Bubble Tea is a Go-based Terminal User Interface (TUI) framework built on the Elm Architecture, offering a functional and stateful approach to development. It is suitable for building simple to complex terminal applications, supporting inline, full-window, or mixed modes, with features like high-performance rendering, keyboard/mouse handling, and clipboard support, ideal for command-line tools and interactive terminal apps.

metadata.name: LeetCodeAnimation
metadata.description: Demonstrate all the questions on LeetCode in the form of animation.（用动画的形式呈现解LeetCode题目的思路）

summary.zh: 该仓库通过动画形式直观演示LeetCode算法题目的解题思路，涵盖多种经典算法如排序、链表操作等，旨在帮助开发者尤其是算法初学者更易理解复杂逻辑。项目长期维护，提供C++和Java代码实现，结合微信公众号和博客同步更新，是算法学习的优质可视化资源。
summary.en: This repository visually demonstrates LeetCode algorithm problem solutions through animations, covering classic algorithms like sorting and linked list operations. It aims to help developers, especially beginners, better understand complex logic. The project is maintained long-term with C++ and Java implementations, updated via WeChat public account and blog, serving as a high-quality visual resource for algorithm learning.

metadata.name: croc
metadata.description: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another :crocodile: :package:

summary.zh: Croc 是一个跨平台命令行文件传输工具，通过中继服务器实现任意两台计算机间的安全数据传输。它提供端到端加密、支持多文件传输与断点续传，无需本地服务器或端口转发，并兼容 IPv6/IPv4 及代理网络，适用于快速、安全的文件共享场景。
summary.en: Croc is a cross-platform CLI file transfer tool that enables secure data transmission between any two computers via a relay server. It offers end-to-end encryption, supports multiple file transfers with resume capabilities, requires no local server or port forwarding, and is compatible with IPv6/IPv4 and proxy networks, ideal for fast and secure file sharing.

metadata.name: uber_go_guide_cn
metadata.description: Uber Go 语言编码规范中文版. The Uber Go Style Guide .

summary.zh: Uber Go 语言编码规范中文版是Uber内部Go风格指南的翻译项目，提供详细的编码最佳实践，涵盖错误处理、并发控制、性能优化等核心主题。适用于Go开发者提升代码质量和团队协作效率，技术亮点包括实时更新和社区驱动维护。
summary.en: The Uber Go Style Guide Chinese version is a translation project of Uber's internal Go coding standards, offering comprehensive best practices for error handling, concurrency, performance optimization, and more. It serves Go developers to enhance code quality and team collaboration, featuring real-time updates and community-driven maintenance.

metadata.name: chanify
metadata.description: Chanify is a safe and simple notification tools. This repository is command line tools for Chanify.

summary.zh: Chanify 是一个安全、简单的通知工具，专为开发者、系统管理员及普通用户设计，提供命令行工具和 API 实现跨平台消息推送。它支持 Docker 部署、多语言集成（如 Python、Ruby、NodeJS、PHP），并具备无服务器和有服务器节点模式，适用于自动化脚本、系统监控和日常提醒等场景。
summary.en: Chanify is a secure and straightforward notification tool designed for developers, system administrators, and general users, offering command-line tools and APIs for cross-platform message delivery. It supports Docker deployment, multi-language integration (e.g., Python, Ruby, NodeJS, PHP), and includes serverless and serverful node modes, suitable for automation scripts, system monitoring, and daily reminders.

metadata.name: one-python-craftsman
metadata.description: 来自一位 Pythonista 的编程经验分享，内容涵盖编码技巧、最佳实践与思维模式等方面。

summary.zh: 《Python 工匠》是一个专注于Python编程经验分享的开源项目，提供编码技巧、最佳实践与思维模式的深度解析。内容涵盖变量命名、条件分支、容器操作、函数设计等核心主题，旨在帮助开发者提升代码质量与工程实践能力。项目还关联同名图书，扩展了函数、面向对象等章节，适合Python初学者和进阶者学习。
summary.en: The 'Python Craftsman' is an open-source project focused on sharing Python programming experiences, offering in-depth insights into coding techniques, best practices, and mindset. It covers core topics such as variable naming, conditional branching, container operations, and function design, aiming to help developers improve code quality and engineering practices. The project is linked to a book of the same name, which expands on chapters like functions and object-oriented programming, suitable for both beginners and advanced Python learners.

metadata.name: KeymouseGo
metadata.description: 类似按键精灵的鼠标键盘录制和自动化操作 模拟点击和键入 | automate mouse clicks and keyboard input

summary.zh: KeymouseGo 是一款跨平台的鼠标键盘录制与自动化工具，类似精简版按键精灵。它通过 Python 编写，支持 Windows、Linux 和 macOS，可录制用户操作并自动执行，适用于重复性任务自动化，提升工作效率。
summary.en: KeymouseGo is a cross-platform mouse and keyboard recording and automation tool, akin to a lightweight version of AutoHotkey. Built with Python, it supports Windows, Linux, and macOS, enabling users to record actions and automate repetitive tasks for enhanced productivity.

metadata.name: kubernetes-handbook
metadata.description: Kubernetes 架构与生态：从云原生到 AI 原生基础设施的构建指南

summary.zh: 《Kubernetes 手册》是一本实战导向的中文电子书，系统介绍 Kubernetes 架构、核心组件及云原生生态，涵盖容器编排、服务网格、Serverless 和 AI 原生基础设施。内容基于 Kubernetes v1.31+ 持续更新，提供从零学习到最佳实践的完整指南，适用于构建和管理现代化云原生应用。
summary.en: The 'Kubernetes Handbook' is a practical Chinese e-book that systematically introduces Kubernetes architecture, core components, and the cloud-native ecosystem, covering container orchestration, service mesh, Serverless, and AI-native infrastructure. Continuously updated based on Kubernetes v1.31+, it offers a comprehensive guide from beginner to best practices for building and managing modern cloud-native applications.

metadata.name: the-way-to-go_ZH_CN
metadata.description: 《The Way to Go》中文译本，中文正式名《Go 入门指南》

summary.zh: 《Go入门指南》是《The Way to Go》的中文译本，旨在为国内Go语言爱好者提供高质量的学习资源。该书由社区协作翻译，已获原作者授权，内容针对当前Go版本进行更新，覆盖Go语言基础与进阶知识，适合初学者和开发者快速入门。
summary.en: 《Go入门指南》 is the Chinese translation of 《The Way to Go》, providing high-quality learning resources for Go language enthusiasts in China. Translated through community collaboration with author permission, it is updated for current Go versions, covering fundamentals and advanced topics, ideal for beginners and developers to get started quickly.

metadata.name: tao-of-programming
metadata.description: 《编程之道》 (Tao of Programming, 1987) 最新中英双语版

summary.zh: 该仓库提供《编程之道》的最新中英双语版，由Geoffrey James原著、Coco翻译，旨在传播编程哲学与智慧。核心价值在于通过寓言式文本探讨软件开发的本质，应用场景包括程序员教育、技术文化讨论和跨语言学习。技术亮点包括开源协作翻译、社区讨论机制和双语对照格式，促进知识共享与深度思考。
summary.en: This repository offers the latest Chinese-English bilingual edition of 'Tao of Programming' by Geoffrey James, translated by Coco, focusing on disseminating programming philosophy and wisdom. It explores the essence of software development through allegorical texts, applicable in programmer education, technical culture discussions, and cross-language learning. Key features include open-source collaborative translation, community discussion mechanisms, and bilingual formatting to foster knowledge sharing and deep reflection.

metadata.name: gost
metadata.description: GO Simple Tunnel - a simple tunnel written in golang

summary.zh: GO Simple Tunnel (GOST) 是一个用 Go 语言编写的多功能代理和隧道工具，支持 HTTP/HTTPS/HTTP2/SOCKS5 等多种协议，具备多级转发、负载均衡和透明代理等功能，适用于网络穿透、安全通信和流量管理场景。
summary.en: GO Simple Tunnel (GOST) is a versatile proxy and tunneling tool written in Go, supporting multiple protocols like HTTP/HTTPS/HTTP2/SOCKS5, with features such as multi-level forwarding, load balancing, and transparent proxy, ideal for network penetration, secure communication, and traffic management.

metadata.name: python3-cookbook
metadata.description: 《Python Cookbook》 3rd Edition Translation

summary.zh: 《Python Cookbook》第三版中文翻译项目，提供高质量的Python 3编程指南，涵盖实用技巧和最佳实践。适用于Python开发者学习和参考，支持在线阅读和PDF下载，基于reStructuredText和Sphinx构建，代码在Python 3.6下测试通过。
summary.en: A Chinese translation project for 'Python Cookbook' 3rd Edition, offering high-quality Python 3 programming guides with practical tips and best practices. Suitable for Python developers for learning and reference, featuring online reading and PDF downloads, built with reStructuredText and Sphinx, and tested with Python 3.6.

metadata.name: chinese-dos-games
metadata.description: 🎮 Chinese DOS games collections.

summary.zh: 这是一个中文DOS游戏合集项目，提供1898款经典DOS游戏的在线访问与下载。核心价值在于通过Python脚本自动化下载游戏数据，并利用IPFS实现去中心化存储，方便用户怀旧体验。应用场景包括游戏收藏、历史研究和文化传播，技术亮点包括自动化工具和分布式存储。
summary.en: This project is a collection of Chinese DOS games, offering online access and downloads for 1898 classic titles. It provides automated data retrieval via Python scripts and decentralized storage through IPFS, enabling nostalgic gaming experiences. Key applications include game archiving, historical research, and cultural preservation, with technical highlights in automation and distributed systems.

summary.zh: GhostVM 是一款基于 Apple Virtualization.framework 的 macOS 原生应用，用于在 Apple Silicon 上创建和管理 macOS 虚拟机。它提供自包含的 .GhostVM 捆绑包，支持快照、克隆和深度主机集成，适用于 AI 智能体沙箱、开发环境隔离和跨版本测试等场景。
summary.en: GhostVM is a native macOS application that leverages Apple's Virtualization.framework to create and manage macOS virtual machines on Apple Silicon. It features self-contained .GhostVM bundles with snapshot, cloning, and deep host integration capabilities, ideal for AI agent sandboxing, disposable development environments, and cross-version testing.

metadata.name: flow
metadata.description: 企业级流程中心（基于flowable和bpmn.js封装的流程引擎）

summary.zh: Flow 是一个基于 Flowable 和 Bpmn.js 封装的企业级流程引擎，提供开箱即用的流程设计、表单管理和门户集成解决方案。它采用 Java 后端与 Vue3 前端技术栈，支持可视化流程建模，适用于企业数智化转型中的业务流程自动化与管理。
summary.en: Flow is an enterprise-grade process engine built on Flowable and Bpmn.js, offering an out-of-the-box solution for process design, form management, and portal integration. It utilizes Java backend and Vue3 frontend technologies, enabling visual process modeling for business process automation and management in digital transformation.

metadata.name: httpbin
metadata.description: HTTP Request & Response Service, written in Python + Flask.

summary.zh: httpbin 是一个基于 Python 和 Flask 构建的 HTTP 请求与响应服务，用于测试和调试 HTTP 客户端。它提供多种端点模拟常见 HTTP 操作，如 GET、POST、身份验证和状态码返回，支持本地 Docker 部署和在线访问，是开发者和测试人员的实用工具。
summary.en: httpbin is an HTTP request and response service built with Python and Flask, designed for testing and debugging HTTP clients. It offers various endpoints to simulate common HTTP operations like GET, POST, authentication, and status codes, supporting local Docker deployment and online access, making it a practical tool for developers and testers.

metadata.name: colima
metadata.description: Container runtimes on macOS (and Linux) with minimal setup

summary.zh: Colima 是一个在 macOS 和 Linux 上提供容器运行时的工具，通过最小化设置简化容器化开发。它支持 Docker、Containerd 和 Incus 等多种运行时，并具备 GPU 加速功能，特别适用于 AI 工作负载。其简单 CLI 接口、自动端口转发和卷挂载特性，使开发者能快速部署和管理容器环境。
summary.en: Colima is a tool that provides container runtimes on macOS and Linux with minimal setup, simplifying containerized development. It supports multiple runtimes like Docker, Containerd, and Incus, and includes GPU acceleration for AI workloads. Features such as a simple CLI interface, automatic port forwarding, and volume mounts enable developers to quickly deploy and manage container environments.

metadata.name: orbstack
metadata.description: Fast, light, simple Docker containers & Linux machines

summary.zh: OrbStack 是一款快速、轻量且易于使用的 Docker 容器和 Linux 虚拟机运行工具，作为 WSL 和 Docker Desktop 的替代方案，提供闪电般的启动速度、低资源消耗和强大的功能集成，适用于开发、测试和运维场景。
summary.en: OrbStack is a fast, lightweight, and easy-to-use tool for running Docker containers and Linux machines, serving as an alternative to WSL and Docker Desktop with lightning-fast startup, low resource usage, and powerful integrations for development, testing, and operations.

metadata.name: mcp-go
metadata.description: A Go implementation of the Model Context Protocol (MCP), enabling seamless integration between LLM applications and external data sources and tools.

summary.zh: MCP Go 是 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 的 Go 语言实现，专为 LLM 应用设计，提供与外部数据源和工具的无缝集成。它简化了 MCP 服务器的开发，通过高级接口减少样板代码，支持快速构建工具和资源，适用于 AI 智能体、自动化工具等场景。
summary.en: MCP Go is a Go implementation of the Model Context Protocol (MCP), designed for LLM applications to enable seamless integration with external data sources and tools. It simplifies MCP server development with a high-level interface, reducing boilerplate code and facilitating rapid tool and resource creation for AI agents and automation tools.

metadata.name: rover
metadata.description: Powerful & easy sing-box GUI desktop client

summary.zh: Rover 是一款基于 sing-box 内核的下一代图形化代理客户端，提供全可视化配置界面，支持跨平台运行。核心亮点包括图形化路由规则编辑器、DNS 策略管理和一键规则集管理，内置模板简化流量分流，兼容 Clash 订阅格式，适用于网络代理和隐私保护场景。
summary.en: Rover is a next-generation GUI desktop client built on the sing-box core, offering full visual configuration and cross-platform support. Key features include a graphical route rule editor, DNS policy management, and one-click rule set handling, with built-in templates for easy traffic splitting and Clash subscription compatibility, ideal for network proxying and privacy protection.

metadata.name: rustfs
metadata.description: 🚀2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads. RustFS is an open-source, S3-compatible high-performance object storage system supporting migration and coexistence with other S3-compatible platforms such as MinIO and Ceph.

summary.zh: RustFS 是一个基于 Rust 构建的高性能分布式对象存储系统，完全兼容 S3 协议，支持与 MinIO、Ceph 等平台迁移共存。其核心优势在于性能卓越，针对 4KB 小对象负载比 MinIO 快 2.3 倍，适用于数据湖、AI 和大数据等高吞吐场景，采用 Apache 2.0 开源许可，提供安全、可扩展的存储解决方案。
summary.en: RustFS is a high-performance distributed object storage system built in Rust, fully S3-compatible and supporting migration and coexistence with platforms like MinIO and Ceph. It excels in performance, being 2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads, optimized for data lakes, AI, and big data workloads. Licensed under Apache 2.0, it offers a secure, scalable storage solution.
